scenarios.title: Malware Detection Triage
scenarios.description: A Security Operations Center (SOC) analyst receives a high-priority alert from an Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) tool indicating malware on a user's workstation.

scenarios.title: Threat Hunting for DNS Tunneling
scenarios.description: A threat hunter hypothesizes that an attacker is exfiltrating data via DNS tunneling. They must query DNS logs to find evidence.

scenarios.title: Ransomware Containment
scenarios.description: An incident responder must contain a ransomware outbreak that is actively spreading across the network.

scenarios.title: Disk Forensics for Data Exfiltration
scenarios.description: A forensics investigator must analyze a disk image from a compromised server to determine what data was stolen.

scenarios.title: Web Application Vulnerability Scan
scenarios.description: A vulnerability analyst must run a dynamic application security test (DAST) against a new public-facing web application before it goes live.

scenarios.title: Internal Network Penetration Test
scenarios.description: A penetration tester, having gained initial access to a workstation, must attempt to escalate privileges to Domain Admin.

scenarios.title: Emergency Server Patching
scenarios.description: A critical, zero-day vulnerability is announced for the operating system used by all web servers. An analyst must coordinate emergency patching.

scenarios.title: Operationalizing Threat Intelligence
scenarios.description: A threat intelligence analyst receives a feed with new Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) for an active malware campaign.

scenarios.title: New Employee Onboarding
scenarios.description: An IAM analyst must provision a new account and access for a new employee starting in the marketing department.

scenarios.title: MFA Token Reset
scenarios.description: A user who lost their phone needs their multi-factor authentication (MFA) token reset so they can log in.

scenarios.title: Privileged Access Checkout
scenarios.description: A database administrator needs to check out the credentials for a privileged database account to perform maintenance.

scenarios.title: Quarterly Access Review
scenarios.description: A security analyst initiates the quarterly access review process, requiring managers to certify their direct reports' access rights.

scenarios.title: Password Policy Update
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must update the corporate password policy to meet a new compliance framework's requirements (e.g., increasing minimum length).

scenarios.title: New Vendor Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must conduct a security risk assessment of a new SaaS vendor that will handle sensitive customer data.

scenarios.title: PCI DSS Compliance Audit
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must gather evidence to demonstrate compliance with a specific PCI DSS requirement for an upcoming audit.

scenarios.title: Phishing Simulation Campaign
scenarios.description: A security awareness manager must conduct a simulated phishing campaign to test employee vigilance.

scenarios.title: User-Reported Phishing Triage
scenarios.description: A SOC analyst receives an email reported by a user as suspicious and must determine if it is malicious.

scenarios.title: Threat Hunting for Malicious PowerShell
scenarios.description: A threat hunter suspects an attacker is using obfuscated PowerShell commands for 'living off the land'. They must search command line logs for evidence.

scenarios.title: User Account Compromise Containment
scenarios.description: An alert indicates a user account is logging in from two different countries simultaneously. An incident responder must contain the compromised account.

scenarios.title: Network Forensics for C2 Communication
scenarios.description: An investigator must analyze a network packet capture (PCAP) file from a compromised host to identify the attacker's command-and-control (C2) channel.

scenarios.title: Quarterly Network Vulnerability Scan
scenarios.description: A vulnerability analyst must perform the quarterly authenticated vulnerability scan of the company's DMZ network segment.

scenarios.title: Physical Security Penetration Test
scenarios.description: A penetration tester is tasked with gaining unauthorized physical access to a corporate office building to test security controls.

scenarios.title: Monthly Workstation Patching
scenarios.description: An analyst must deploy the latest 'Patch Tuesday' security updates to all corporate workstations.

scenarios.title: Analyzing a New Phishing Kit
scenarios.description: A threat intelligence analyst discovers a new phishing kit being sold on a dark web forum and must analyze it to develop countermeasures.

scenarios.title: Employee Termination
scenarios.description: An IAM analyst must immediately deprovision all access for an employee who has been terminated.

scenarios.title: SSO Service Outage
scenarios.description: The company's Single Sign-On (SSO) provider is having an outage, preventing all users from logging into cloud applications. An analyst must manage the incident.

scenarios.title: Privileged Session Monitoring
scenarios.description: A security analyst must review a recorded session of a contractor who used a privileged account to access a critical server.

scenarios.title: New Access Role Creation
scenarios.description: A new project requires a new access role to be created that combines permissions from multiple applications. An IAM analyst must design and create the role.

scenarios.title: Policy Exception Request
scenarios.description: A developer requests a temporary exception to the security policy that blocks outbound traffic so they can connect to a new third-party API for testing.

scenarios.title: System Security Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must perform a security risk assessment on a legacy, business-critical application that cannot be easily patched.

scenarios.title: GDPR Data Deletion Audit
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must audit the process for handling 'right to be forgotten' requests to ensure compliance with GDPR.

scenarios.title: New Hire Security Training
scenarios.description: A security awareness manager must ensure all new hires complete their mandatory security awareness training within 30 days of starting.

scenarios.title: Network IDS Alert Triage
scenarios.description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from a network Intrusion Detection System (IDS) for a potential SQL injection attempt against a web server.

scenarios.title: Threat Hunting for Lateral Movement
scenarios.description: A threat hunter is looking for signs of lateral movement by searching for suspicious use of administrative tools like PsExec.

scenarios.title: Malware Eradication
scenarios.description: Following a malware outbreak, an incident responder must ensure the malware is completely removed from all affected systems.

scenarios.title: Memory Forensics for Fileless Malware
scenarios.description: An investigator suspects a host is compromised with fileless malware living only in memory. They must perform a memory analysis.

scenarios.title: Source Code Repository Scan
scenarios.description: An analyst must configure a Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tool to automatically scan a source code repository for vulnerabilities on every new commit.

scenarios.title: Social Engineering Penetration Test
scenarios.description: A penetration tester is tasked with gaining a user's password through a vishing (voice phishing) phone call.

scenarios.title: Third-Party Software Patching
scenarios.description: A vulnerability is discovered in a widely used third-party library (e.g., Log4j). An analyst must find all applications using the library and coordinate patching.

scenarios.title: Analyzing Adversary TTPs
scenarios.description: A threat intelligence analyst is researching a specific adversary group to understand their tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs).

scenarios.title: Contractor Onboarding
scenarios.description: An IAM analyst must provision a temporary account for a contractor with access that automatically expires at the end of their contract.

scenarios.title: Password Policy Enforcement
scenarios.description: An analyst must configure the domain controller to enforce a new, stronger password policy.

scenarios.title: Service Account Credential Management
scenarios.description: An analyst must onboard a new application's service account into the PAM tool to enable automatic password rotation.

scenarios.title: Separation of Duties Policy
scenarios.description: An analyst must create a Separation of Duties (SoD) policy in the IGA tool to prevent a single user from having two conflicting permissions (e.g., creating a vendor and approving a payment).

scenarios.title: Annual Acceptable Use Policy Review
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must conduct the annual review of the Acceptable Use Policy (AUP) and require all employees to re-acknowledge it.

scenarios.title: Data Classification Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst discovers a database containing sensitive PII that is incorrectly classified as 'Public'. They must perform a risk assessment.

scenarios.title: HIPAA Compliance Audit
scenarios.description: An analyst must audit access logs for a database containing patient data to ensure only authorized medical personnel have accessed it.

scenarios.title: Role-Based Security Training
scenarios.description: A security awareness manager needs to assign specialized, role-based training to different departments.

scenarios.title: WAF Alert Triage
scenarios.description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from the Web Application Firewall (WAF) for a cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt.

scenarios.title: Threat Hunting for New Services
scenarios.description: A threat hunter is looking for malware persistence by searching for newly created, unauthorized services on workstations.

scenarios.title: Cloud Data Leak Containment
scenarios.description: A Data Loss Prevention (DLP) tool alerts that a file containing sensitive data has been uploaded to a public cloud storage site.

scenarios.title: Log Analysis for Account Compromise
scenarios.description: An investigator must analyze logs from multiple systems (AD, VPN, O365) to create a timeline of an account compromise.

scenarios.title: Container Image Vulnerability Scan
scenarios.description: An analyst must scan a new Docker container image for known vulnerabilities in its OS packages and libraries before it can be deployed to production.

scenarios.title: Wireless Network Penetration Test
scenarios.description: A penetration tester is tasked with cracking the password for the corporate guest Wi-Fi network.

scenarios.title: Database Server Patching
scenarios.description: An analyst must apply a critical security patch to a production database server, which requires downtime.

scenarios.title: Prioritizing a new CVE
scenarios.description: A new critical CVE is announced. A threat intelligence analyst must determine its relevance and risk to the organization.

scenarios.title: Employee Role Change
scenarios.description: An employee is moving from the Sales department to the Finance department. An IAM analyst must update their access accordingly.

scenarios.title: Troubleshoot Access Denied Issue
scenarios.description: A user is reporting they are receiving an 'Access Denied' error when trying to access a folder they believe they should have access to.

scenarios.title: Emergency 'Break Glass' Access
scenarios.description: A critical system is down, and the normal administrator is unavailable. A different administrator needs emergency 'break glass' access to fix it.

scenarios.title: Orphaned Account Cleanup
scenarios.description: An analyst must run a report to find 'orphaned' accounts (accounts that are not associated with a current employee) and disable them.

scenarios.title: Cloud Security Policy Creation
scenarios.description: As the company moves to the cloud, a GRC analyst must create a new Cloud Security Policy from scratch.

scenarios.title: New Project Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must conduct a security risk assessment for a new internal project to develop a mobile application.

scenarios.title: SOX ITGC Audit
scenarios.description: An analyst must test IT General Controls (ITGCs) for a Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX) audit, specifically focusing on change management.

scenarios.title: Executive Threat Briefing
scenarios.description: A security awareness manager must prepare and deliver a threat briefing to the company's executive leadership team.

scenarios.title: Insider Threat Alert Triage
scenarios.description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from a User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) tool that a user has downloaded an unusually large amount of data.

scenarios.title: Threat Hunting with Command Line Auditing
scenarios.description: A threat hunter is searching for suspicious command line arguments that might indicate malicious activity.

scenarios.title: Malicious Domain Containment
scenarios.description: Threat intelligence indicates a domain is being used to host malware. An incident responder must block access to it.

scenarios.title: Malicious Mobile App Forensics
scenarios.description: An investigator must perform a forensic analysis of a suspicious Android application (APK file).

scenarios.title: Cloud Security Posture Scan
scenarios.description: An analyst must run a Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) scan to find misconfigurations in the company's AWS environment.

scenarios.title: API Penetration Test
scenarios.description: A penetration tester is tasked with finding security flaws in a new REST API.

scenarios.title: Live Kernel Patching
scenarios.description: An analyst must apply a critical vulnerability patch to the Linux kernel on hundreds of production servers without rebooting them.

scenarios.title: Weekly Threat Intelligence Briefing
scenarios.description: A threat intelligence analyst must prepare the weekly threat briefing for the CISO and security leadership.

scenarios.title: Rehired Employee Onboarding
scenarios.description: An employee who left the company six months ago is rehired. An IAM analyst must re-enable their old account and provision new access.

scenarios.title: Certificate-Based Authentication Issue
scenarios.description: A user is unable to access a secure internal website because their client certificate has expired.

scenarios.title: API Key Rotation
scenarios.description: An analyst must rotate the secret API key for a critical service that integrates with a third-party vendor.

scenarios.title: Dormant Account Review
scenarios.description: An analyst must run a quarterly report to find accounts that have not been used for over 90 days and disable them.

scenarios.title: Policy Violation Investigation
scenarios.description: A DLP tool flags an employee for attempting to email a sensitive document to their personal email address, violating policy. A GRC analyst must investigate.

scenarios.title: Third-Party Breach Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A third-party vendor announces they have suffered a data breach. A GRC analyst must assess the risk to their own company.

scenarios.title: Automated Audit Evidence Collection
scenarios.description: An analyst must configure a GRC tool to automatically collect evidence for a compliance audit.

scenarios.title: Security Awareness Metrics Reporting
scenarios.description: A manager must create a dashboard to report on the effectiveness of the security awareness program to leadership.

scenarios.title: Impossible Travel Alert Triage
scenarios.description: A SOC analyst receives an alert that a user has logged in from India and Brazil within 5 minutes. The analyst must triage this 'impossible travel' alert.

scenarios.title: Threat Hunting for Malicious Scheduled Tasks
scenarios.description: A threat hunter is looking for malware persistence established via scheduled tasks.

scenarios.title: Rogue Device Containment
scenarios.description: A network access control (NAC) system alerts that an unauthorized device (e.g., a personal laptop) has connected to a corporate network port.

scenarios.title: Incident Timeline Analysis
scenarios.description: An investigator must create a master timeline of an entire security breach by combining artifacts from disk, memory, and network forensics.

scenarios.title: IoT Device Vulnerability Scan
scenarios.description: An analyst must assess the security of a new IoT device (e.g., a smart camera) before it is approved for corporate use.

scenarios.title: Red Team Operation
scenarios.description: A red team is tasked with simulating a real-world adversary by attempting to breach the company and achieve a specific objective (e.g., access the CEO's email) without being detected.

scenarios.title: Virtual Patching with WAF
scenarios.description: A critical vulnerability is found in a legacy web application that cannot be immediately patched. An analyst must apply a 'virtual patch' using a Web Application Firewall (WAF).

scenarios.title: Dark Web Monitoring
scenarios.description: A threat intelligence analyst is monitoring dark web markets for stolen company credentials.

scenarios.title: Bulk User Provisioning
scenarios.description: An IAM analyst must provision accounts for a class of 50 new summer interns.

scenarios.title: Passwordless Authentication Rollout
scenarios.description: An analyst is rolling out passwordless authentication (e.g., using FIDO2 security keys) to a pilot group of users.

scenarios.title: SSH Key Management
scenarios.description: An analyst must onboard a developer's SSH key into a PAM system to provide audited, temporary access to a production server.

scenarios.title: User Access Request Workflow
scenarios.description: A user requests access to a new application. The request must go through a formal approval workflow.

scenarios.title: Control Framework Mapping
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must map the company's internal security controls to a new compliance framework (e.g., ISO 27001).

scenarios.title: Quantitative Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: An analyst must perform a quantitative risk assessment for a potential data breach, calculating the potential financial loss.

scenarios.title: CJIS Compliance Audit
scenarios.description: An analyst for a police department must audit their systems to ensure compliance with the FBI's Criminal Justice Information Services (CJIS) security policy.

scenarios.title: Security Awareness Gamification
scenarios.description: A manager wants to increase engagement with the security awareness program by implementing gamification.

scenarios.title: Triage with Threat Intelligence
scenarios.description: A SOC analyst receives an EDR alert for a file with a specific hash. The analyst must use threat intelligence to triage it.

scenarios.title: Assumed Breach Penetration Test
scenarios.description: A penetration tester is given a standard user account and tasked with seeing if they can achieve a specific objective, simulating an attacker who has already stolen credentials.

scenarios.title: Remediating Entitlement Creep
scenarios.description: An access review reveals a long-term employee has accumulated access from multiple previous roles that they no longer need ('entitlement creep'). An analyst must remediate this.

scenarios.title: Merger & Acquisition Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A GRC analyst must perform a high-level cybersecurity risk assessment of a company that is being acquired.

scenarios.title: Airborne Threat Assessment
scenarios.description: An operator must assess multiple inbound, unidentified aircraft to determine their threat level and recommend an appropriate response.

scenarios.title: Maritime Smuggling Vessel Identification
scenarios.description: An analyst must fuse satellite imagery (IMINT) with signals intelligence (SIGINT) to identify a vessel suspected of smuggling.

scenarios.title: Forward Operating Base Fuel Resupply
scenarios.description: A logistics officer must reroute a fuel convoy after its primary route is compromised by enemy activity.

scenarios.title: Course of Action Analysis for Bridge Seizure
scenarios.description: A mission planner must develop and compare two courses of action (COA) for seizing a critical bridge: an air assault and a ground assault.

scenarios.title: Network Intrusion Detection and Response
scenarios.description: A cybersecurity analyst must respond to an alert indicating a potential advanced persistent threat (APT) actor on a classified network.

scenarios.title: Air Defense Asset Management
scenarios.description: An Air Defense Officer must allocate surface-to-air missile (SAM) systems to engage multiple incoming cruise missiles.

scenarios.title: Vehicle Target Identification
scenarios.description: An analyst must use drone full-motion video (FMV) to positively identify a specific vehicle in a convoy believed to be carrying a high-value individual (HVI).

scenarios.title: Helicopter Predictive Maintenance
scenarios.description: A maintenance officer receives an alert from a helicopter's health and usage monitoring system (HUMS) predicting an impending gearbox failure.

scenarios.title: Airspace Route Deconfliction
scenarios.description: A planner must deconflict the flight paths of a strike package, an ISR drone, and a refueling tanker in a compressed airspace.

scenarios.title: SCADA System Vulnerability Assessment
scenarios.description: A cyber analyst must assess a report of a new vulnerability in a SCADA system that controls a base's power grid.

scenarios.title: Rules of Engagement Compliance Check
scenarios.description: Before approving a strike, a commander must use an agent to verify that the proposed target and weapon selection comply with the current Rules of Engagement (ROE).

scenarios.title: Border Anomaly Detection
scenarios.description: An analyst must review wide-area motion imagery (WAMI) to detect anomalous activity along a monitored border.

scenarios.title: Unit Personnel Readiness Assessment
scenarios.description: A commander needs to assess their unit's personnel readiness for an upcoming rapid deployment.

scenarios.title: Mission Resource and Ordnance Planning
scenarios.description: A planner must select the optimal aircraft and munitions to destroy a hardened enemy command bunker.

scenarios.title: Information Operations Planning
scenarios.description: An Information Operations officer must plan a campaign to disrupt an adversary's propaganda network.

scenarios.title: Common Operating Picture Management
scenarios.description: An operator must manage the Common Operating Picture (COP) during a multi-domain operation, ensuring all friendly and enemy tracks are accurately displayed.

scenarios.title: ISR Drone Asset Planning
scenarios.description: An ISR planner must create a flight plan for a surveillance drone to cover multiple intelligence collection targets.

scenarios.title: Brigade Deployment Planning
scenarios.description: A logistics planner must create a strategic deployment plan to move a brigade and its equipment from its home base to a theater of operations.

scenarios.title: Dynamic Mission Re-tasking
scenarios.description: A fighter jet on a routine patrol is dynamically re-tasked to strike a newly discovered, time-sensitive target.

scenarios.title: Cyber Forensics and Attribution
scenarios.description: Following a network breach, a cyber forensics analyst must analyze the attacker's malware to determine its capabilities and origin.

scenarios.title: Subsurface Threat Assessment
scenarios.description: A naval operator must assess an unidentified subsurface contact detected by sonar to determine if it is a hostile submarine.

scenarios.title: Ground Force Activity Analysis
scenarios.description: An analyst must fuse ground sensor data, drone video, and communications intelligence to assess an enemy's intent in a specific sector.

scenarios.title: Urgent MEDEVAC Resource Allocation
scenarios.description: A logistics officer must coordinate an urgent medical evacuation (MEDEVAC) for a critically wounded soldier from a remote location.

scenarios.title: Course of Action Analysis for Cyber Attack
scenarios.description: A cyber mission planner must evaluate two COAs to neutralize an adversary's air defense network: a kinetic strike vs. a non-kinetic cyberattack.

scenarios.title: Spear-Phishing Attack Response
scenarios.description: An analyst detects a targeted spear-phishing campaign against high-ranking officials.

scenarios.title: Special Operations Asset Management
scenarios.description: A C2 operator must coordinate air, ground, and intelligence assets to support a special operations team conducting a raid.

scenarios.title: Naval Vessel Identification
scenarios.description: An analyst must use a combination of radar data and Electronic Support Measures (ESM) to identify a warship operating without a transponder.

scenarios.title: Tank Engine Predictive Maintenance
scenarios.description: An onboard sensor in a main battle tank predicts imminent engine failure based on oil analysis and temperature data.

scenarios.title: Ground Convoy Route Deconfliction
scenarios.description: A planner must deconflict the routes of two separate convoys (one supply, one combat) and a scheduled artillery fire mission.

scenarios.title: Drone Software Vulnerability Assessment
scenarios.description: A new vulnerability is discovered in the operating system of a widely used surveillance drone.

scenarios.title: Maritime Interdiction ROE Compliance
scenarios.description: A warship commander needs to determine if they are authorized to board a vessel suspected of violating sanctions based on the current ROE.

scenarios.title: Network Traffic Anomaly Detection
scenarios.description: An analyst must monitor network traffic logs to detect anomalous behavior indicative of a stealthy cyberattack.

scenarios.title: Fighter Pilot Readiness Assessment
scenarios.description: A squadron commander needs to ensure all pilots are current on their training and certifications before a major exercise.

scenarios.title: ISR Asset Resource Planning
scenarios.description: A planner must select the best ISR asset to find a mobile surface-to-air missile (SAM) launcher hidden in a forested area.

scenarios.title: Countering Social Media Disinformation
scenarios.description: An IO officer detects an adversary-controlled bot network spreading disinformation about troop movements on social media.

scenarios.title: Resolving Conflicting COP Data
scenarios.description: A friendly aircraft's IFF system is malfunctioning, causing it to appear as an 'unidentified' track on the COP, dangerously close to an air defense zone.

scenarios.title: Satellite Re-tasking for Imagery
scenarios.description: An analyst needs to urgently re-task an imaging satellite to capture pictures of a suspected new military construction site.

scenarios.title: Equipment Redeployment and Reset
scenarios.description: A logistics planner must plan the redeployment of a unit's equipment from a theater of operations back to its home base for maintenance and reset.

scenarios.title: Dynamic Re-tasking due to Weather
scenarios.description: A planned air strike is aborted due to bad weather over the primary target. The strike package must be re-tasked to a secondary target.

scenarios.title: Insider Threat Cyber Forensics
scenarios.description: An analyst must investigate suspicious network activity from an insider's account, including large data transfers to an external device.

scenarios.title: Ballistic Missile Launch Threat Assessment
scenarios.description: An operator at a strategic command center must assess a detected ballistic missile launch to determine its trajectory and intended target.

scenarios.title: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) Fusion
scenarios.description: An OSINT analyst must fuse social media posts, news reports, and satellite imagery to assess battle damage after a strike.

scenarios.title: Artillery Ammunition Resupply
scenarios.description: A logistics officer must manage the emergency resupply of ammunition to an artillery unit in heavy combat.

scenarios.title: Course of Action Analysis for Hostage Rescue
scenarios.description: A planner must compare two COAs for a hostage rescue: a stealthy nighttime insertion vs. a rapid daylight assault.

scenarios.title: DDoS Attack Mitigation
scenarios.description: An analyst must mitigate a Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attack that is overwhelming a public-facing military website.

scenarios.title: Coordinated Fires Asset Management
scenarios.description: A fires officer must deconflict and synchronize artillery, naval gunfire, and close air support to suppress enemy defenses.

scenarios.title: High-Value Individual Identification
scenarios.description: An analyst must use facial recognition on drone footage to confirm the identity of a high-value individual (HVI) at a meeting.

scenarios.title: Naval Vessel Predictive Maintenance
scenarios.description: A ship's monitoring system detects unusual vibration in a propeller shaft, indicating a potential future failure.

scenarios.title: Maritime Route Deconfliction
scenarios.description: A planner must deconflict the transit route of a carrier strike group with commercial shipping lanes and a known submarine threat area.

scenarios.title: Weapon System Software Vulnerability
scenarios.description: A cyber analyst learns of a vulnerability in the targeting software of a smart bomb that could be exploited by GPS spoofing.

scenarios.title: Cyber Attack ROE Compliance
scenarios.description: A cyber commander must verify that a proposed cyberattack against an adversary's infrastructure complies with the Law of Armed Conflict and specific ROE.

scenarios.title: Maritime 'Dark Vessel' Anomaly Detection
scenarios.description: An analyst must identify 'dark vessels' (ships that have turned off their AIS transponders) in a high-traffic shipping lane.

scenarios.title: Critical Skill Specialist Readiness
scenarios.description: A joint task force commander needs to identify all available personnel with a critical skill (e.g., a specific foreign language) across all branches of service.

scenarios.title: Electronic Warfare Resource Planning
scenarios.description: A planner must select the correct electronic warfare (EW) jamming asset to suppress an enemy's air defense radar during a strike.

scenarios.title: Military Deception Planning
scenarios.description: An IO officer must plan a military deception (MILDEC) operation to make an adversary believe an attack is coming from one direction, while the real attack comes from another.

scenarios.title: Friendly Fire Prevention via COP
scenarios.description: An operator notices a ground unit has called for an air strike dangerously close to another friendly unit's position.

scenarios.title: Multi-INT Asset Planning
scenarios.description: A planner must coordinate satellite imagery (IMINT), signals intelligence (SIGINT), and a human intelligence (HUMINT) source to find a hidden weapons cache.

scenarios.title: Personnel Redeployment Planning
scenarios.description: A logistics planner must create a schedule to redeploy 5,000 personnel from a theater of operations back to their home country.

scenarios.title: Dynamic Re-tasking due to Pop-up Threat
scenarios.description: A flight of attack aircraft is en route to a planned target when a previously unknown mobile SAM system activates near their flight path.

scenarios.title: Ransomware Forensic Data Recovery
scenarios.description: A critical server has been hit by ransomware, encrypting all files. A forensics analyst must attempt to recover the data without paying the ransom.

scenarios.title: Drone Swarm Threat Assessment
scenarios.description: An operator must assess an approaching swarm of small, unidentified drones to determine if they are a coordinated threat to a naval vessel.

scenarios.title: Multi-INT Fusion for Threat Network
scenarios.description: An analyst must fuse HUMINT, SIGINT, and financial intelligence (FININT) to map a terrorist network.

scenarios.title: Potable Water Resupply in Arid Environment
scenarios.description: A logistics officer must plan the production and distribution of potable water for a battalion operating in the desert.

scenarios.title: Course of Action Analysis for Maritime Chokepoint Transit
scenarios.description: A naval planner must compare two COAs for a fleet to transit a dangerous maritime chokepoint: a high-speed transit vs. a slower, more deliberate transit with enhanced ISR.

scenarios.title: Classified Data Spill Response
scenarios.description: An analyst discovers that a classified document was accidentally sent over an unclassified email system.

scenarios.title: Close Air Support (CAS) Asset Management
scenarios.description: A Joint Terminal Attack Controller (JTAC) must select and control a Close Air Support aircraft to engage enemy forces in close proximity to friendly troops.

scenarios.title: Air Defense Radar Site Identification
scenarios.description: An analyst must use electronic intelligence (ELINT) to identify the specific type of an enemy air defense radar site.

scenarios.title: Fighter Jet Landing Gear Predictive Maintenance
scenarios.description: Sensors on a fighter jet's landing gear indicate abnormal stress during recent landings, predicting a potential failure.

scenarios.title: Submarine Route Deconfliction
scenarios.description: A submarine planner must plot a safe underwater transit route that avoids known undersea obstacles, neutral submarine operating areas, and surface shipping.

scenarios.title: Radio Encryption Vulnerability
scenarios.description: A new cryptographic vulnerability is discovered in the encryption algorithm used by a military radio system.

scenarios.title: Self-Defense ROE Compliance Check
scenarios.description: A ship's captain is being approached by fast-attack craft and must determine if they have demonstrated hostile intent, authorizing engagement in self-defense under the ROE.

scenarios.title: Personnel Behavior Anomaly Detection
scenarios.description: An analyst must review a service member's network activity for anomalies that could indicate an insider threat (e.g., espionage, radicalization).

scenarios.title: Medical Personnel Readiness
scenarios.description: A hospital ship commander needs to verify that all medical staff have the required certifications and immunizations for an upcoming humanitarian mission.

scenarios.title: Logistics Convoy Resource Planning
scenarios.description: A planner must select the right number and type of vehicles for a supply convoy, including gun trucks for security.

scenarios.title: Psychological Operations (PSYOP) Planning
scenarios.description: A PSYOP officer must plan a leaflet drop and radio broadcast campaign to encourage enemy soldiers to surrender.

scenarios.title: Managing COP with Sensor Outage
scenarios.description: A key long-range radar goes offline, creating a gap in the Common Operating Picture. An operator must mitigate the gap.

scenarios.title: Unattended Ground Sensor Planning
scenarios.description: An intelligence officer must plan the placement of unattended ground sensors (UGS) to monitor a key trail used by insurgents.

scenarios.title: Equipment Redeployment Environmental Compliance
scenarios.description: A logistics officer must ensure all vehicles being redeployed are thoroughly cleaned to prevent the transport of foreign soil, seeds, or contaminants.

scenarios.title: Dynamic Re-tasking of CAS for Troops in Contact
scenarios.description: A ground unit makes an urgent call for Close Air Support after coming under heavy fire. A nearby CAS aircraft on a different mission must be re-tasked.

scenarios.title: Mobile Device Forensics
scenarios.description: An analyst must conduct a forensic analysis of a captured enemy combatant's smartphone to extract intelligence.

scenarios.title: Cyber-Physical Threat Assessment
scenarios.description: An operator sees a cyberattack on a power grid control system occur simultaneously with drone attacks on substations.

scenarios.title: Imagery Change Detection
scenarios.description: An imagery analyst must compare a new satellite image with an older one of the same location to detect any changes, such as new military construction.

scenarios.title: Blood Supply Chain Management
scenarios.description: A medical logistics officer must manage the supply of blood products to a forward surgical team, ensuring it remains within its temperature-controlled limits.

scenarios.title: Course of Action Analysis for Noncombatant Evacuation (NEO)
scenarios.description: A planner must compare COAs for evacuating citizens from a country with a deteriorating security situation: using military aircraft vs. chartering civilian aircraft.

scenarios.title: GPS Jamming Attack Response
scenarios.description: An operator of a drone reports that they are losing their GPS signal due to suspected enemy jamming.

scenarios.title: Maritime Patrol Aircraft Management
scenarios.description: A C2 operator must manage a fleet of maritime patrol aircraft (MPA) to maintain surveillance over a large ocean area.

scenarios.title: Underground Facility Identification
scenarios.description: An analyst must use a combination of thermal imagery and measurement and signature intelligence (MASINT) to identify a hidden underground facility.

scenarios.title: Submarine Atmosphere Control Predictive Maintenance
scenarios.description: A submarine's atmosphere control system reports slightly elevated CO2 levels, predicting a potential failure in the CO2 scrubbers.

scenarios.title: Multi-Domain Route Deconfliction
scenarios.description: A planner must deconflict a mission that involves a satellite pass, a high-altitude reconnaissance aircraft, and a ground patrol all operating in the same area at the same time.

scenarios.title: Network Router Vulnerability Assessment
scenarios.description: A major network hardware vendor announces a critical remote code execution vulnerability in their enterprise routers.

scenarios.title: Collateral Damage Estimate ROE Compliance
scenarios.description: A proposed air strike's collateral damage estimate (CDE) indicates a risk of civilian casualties. A legal officer must check if this risk is acceptable under the ROE.

scenarios.title: Supply Route Anomaly Detection
scenarios.description: An analyst must monitor traffic patterns on a main supply route to detect behavior indicative of a planned ambush, like the absence of normal traffic.

scenarios.title: Managing Personnel Readiness Under Stop-Loss
scenarios.description: A unit is under 'Stop-Loss' (personnel cannot leave the military) for a deployment. A personnel officer must track the status of soldiers whose contracts would have otherwise expired.

scenarios.title: Special Operations Infiltration Resource Planning
scenarios.description: A planner must select the best infiltration method for a special operations team: a quiet electric vehicle, a helicopter, or a HALO jump.

scenarios.title: Defensive Information Operations
scenarios.description: An IO officer must protect a friendly unit's social media presence from being hijacked or spoofed by an adversary.

scenarios.title: Multi-Platform Track Fusion
scenarios.description: A target is being tracked simultaneously by a ground radar, a naval ship, and an aircraft. An operator must fuse these three separate tracks into a single, high-confidence track on the COP.

scenarios.title: Layered ISR Planning
scenarios.description: A planner must create a layered ISR plan to provide 24/7 surveillance of a high-threat area, using a mix of satellites, high-altitude drones, and medium-altitude drones.

scenarios.title: Redeployment Customs Compliance
scenarios.description: A logistics officer must ensure all equipment and personnel baggage being redeployed complies with customs regulations of the home country.

scenarios.title: Dynamic Re-tasking due to System Failure
scenarios.description: The primary aircraft for a time-sensitive strike mission has a critical system failure on takeoff. A backup aircraft must be immediately launched and re-tasked.

scenarios.title: Network Forensics for Lateral Movement
scenarios.description: After a breach, a forensics analyst must analyze network logs to trace the attacker's lateral movement across the network from the initial point of compromise.

scenarios.title: Update Product Description
scenarios.description: A merchandiser needs to update the description and specifications for an existing product to include new features.

scenarios.title: Process Customer Return for Refund
scenarios.description: A customer service agent needs to process a return for a customer who was unsatisfied with their purchase.

scenarios.title: Customer Account Password Reset
scenarios.description: A customer has forgotten their password and cannot log in to their account.

scenarios.title: Abandoned Cart Follow-Up
scenarios.description: An automated system identifies a customer who abandoned a cart with high-value items. An agent needs to send a follow-up email.

scenarios.title: Apply Flash Sale Pricing
scenarios.description: A marketing manager wants to apply a 24-hour 20% discount to an entire category of products for a flash sale.

scenarios.title: Track Customer Shipment
scenarios.description: A customer is calling to get a status update on their recent order shipment.

scenarios.title: Respond to a Negative Product Review
scenarios.description: A customer left a 1-star review complaining about a product defect. An agent needs to respond publicly and resolve the issue.

scenarios.title: Enroll Customer in Loyalty Program
scenarios.description: During a support interaction, a customer expresses interest in the loyalty program. The agent needs to enroll them.

scenarios.title: Update Inventory After Receiving Shipment
scenarios.description: A warehouse manager needs to update inventory levels after receiving a new shipment of products from a supplier.

scenarios.title: Handle Failed Payment Transaction
scenarios.description: An automated alert flags an order where the customer's payment was declined. An agent needs to contact the customer to resolve it.

scenarios.title: Resolve Damaged Item Report
scenarios.description: A customer reports that an item in their order arrived broken. The agent must resolve the issue.

scenarios.title: Create Personalized Product Recommendations
scenarios.description: A customer is browsing a product page. The system should display personalized recommendations for related products.

scenarios.title: Add a New Product to the Store
scenarios.description: A merchandiser needs to add a brand new product to the e-commerce platform.

scenarios.title: Process a Size Exchange
scenarios.description: A customer ordered a shirt that doesn't fit and wants to exchange it for a different size.

scenarios.title: Answer Product Compatibility Question
scenarios.description: A customer asks if a specific camera lens is compatible with their camera model.

scenarios.title: Launch Email Marketing Campaign
scenarios.description: A marketing manager wants to send a promotional email for a new product line to all customers who have previously purchased from a related category.

scenarios.title: Handle Low Stock Alert
scenarios.description: An automated alert indicates that a popular product is about to run out of stock. The agent needs to take action.

scenarios.title: Cancel an Unshipped Order
scenarios.description: A customer calls to cancel an order they placed an hour ago.

scenarios.title: Update Customer Shipping Address
scenarios.description: A customer needs to update their default shipping address in their account.

scenarios.title: Check Loyalty Points Balance
scenarios.description: A customer wants to know how many loyalty points they have and what they can be redeemed for.

scenarios.title: Curate a 'Back to School' Collection
scenarios.description: A merchandiser wants to create a new curated collection page for a 'Back to School' campaign.

scenarios.title: Investigate Missing Package
scenarios.description: A customer reports their package was marked as 'Delivered' by the carrier, but they never received it.

scenarios.title: Resolve Billing Dispute - Double Charge
scenarios.description: A customer claims they were charged twice for a single order.

scenarios.title: Provide Manual Product Recommendation
scenarios.description: A customer asks a support agent for a recommendation for a running shoe for a specific type of terrain.

scenarios.title: Disable a Discontinued Product
scenarios.description: A product has been discontinued by the manufacturer and needs to be removed from the storefront.

scenarios.title: Issue Store Credit for a Return
scenarios.description: A customer returns an item without a receipt and opts for store credit instead of a refund.

scenarios.title: Answer Product Warranty Question
scenarios.description: A customer wants to know the warranty period for an electronic device they are considering buying.

scenarios.title: Apply Loyalty Points to an Order
scenarios.description: A customer wants to use their loyalty points to get a discount on their current purchase.

scenarios.title: Adjust Price to Match Competitor
scenarios.description: A category manager decides to price-match a key competitor for a specific, popular product.

scenarios.title: Process a BOPIS Order
scenarios.description: A customer places an order online for in-store pickup (BOPIS - Buy Online, Pick up In Store).

scenarios.title: Merge Duplicate Customer Accounts
scenarios.description: A system audit reveals a customer has two accounts under slightly different email addresses. An agent needs to merge them.

scenarios.title: Segment Customers for a Marketing Campaign
scenarios.description: A marketer wants to create a customer segment of 'high-value' customers for an exclusive offer.

scenarios.title: Perform Inventory Cycle Count
scenarios.description: A warehouse manager needs to perform a cycle count for a specific section of the warehouse to ensure inventory accuracy.

scenarios.title: Handle Post-Shipment Delivery Address Change
scenarios.description: A customer needs to change the delivery address for an order that has already been shipped.

scenarios.title: Proactively Ask for Customer Feedback
scenarios.description: A few days after an order is delivered, an automated system should ask the customer for feedback on their experience.

scenarios.title: Redeem a Gift Card
scenarios.description: A customer wants to apply a gift card to their purchase during checkout.

scenarios.title: Update Main Product Image
scenarios.description: The marketing team has provided a new, higher-quality main image for a best-selling product.

scenarios.title: Process Monthly Subscription Billing
scenarios.description: The system needs to process recurring monthly payments for all customers subscribed to a 'Coffee of the Month' club.

scenarios.title: Resolve Incorrect Item Shipped

scenarios.description: A distribution planner needs to forecast the grid impact of a city's policy to ban natural gas in new construction, leading to all-electric homes.

scenarios.title: Wind Turbine Performance Fault Diagnosis
scenarios.description: An operations manager receives an alert for a wind turbine producing 15% less power than expected given current wind speeds. The agent must diagnose the potential cause.

scenarios.title: Solar Farm Generation Forecast
scenarios.description: An operator needs an accurate 48-hour power generation forecast for a 100 MW solar farm.

scenarios.title: Battery Storage Dispatch Optimization
scenarios.description: An operator needs to create an optimal charge/discharge schedule for a 50 MW / 200 MWh battery system for the next 24 hours to maximize revenue from energy arbitrage.

scenarios.title: Solar Farm Preventive Maintenance Scheduling
scenarios.description: An operations planner needs to schedule the annual preventive maintenance for a portfolio of solar farms, minimizing production loss.

scenarios.title: Grid Curtailment Event Analysis
scenarios.description: A solar farm was curtailed by the grid operator. An analyst needs to verify the reason and calculate the financial impact.

scenarios.title: Solar Farm Inverter Failure Alert
scenarios.description: The SCADA system reports a complete failure of one of the central inverters at a solar farm. The agent must assess the impact and initiate a response.

scenarios.title: Vegetation Management Alert near Transmission Line
scenarios.description: An agent analyzes satellite imagery and identifies fast-growing vegetation that could endanger a key transmission line corridor owned by the energy company.

scenarios.title: Hydro Dam Water Level Monitoring
scenarios.description: An operator at a hydroelectric dam needs to assess current water levels and inflow forecasts to plan generation for the coming week.

scenarios.title: Asset Health Index Calculation
scenarios.description: An asset manager wants to calculate a composite 'health index' for each wind turbine in a farm to prioritize maintenance.

scenarios.title: Analyze Drone Inspection Imagery of Wind Turbine Blades
scenarios.description: An asset inspector is reviewing high-resolution images from a drone inspection of a wind turbine blade to identify and classify defects.

scenarios.title: Substation Transformer Health Monitoring
scenarios.description: An agent is monitoring a large substation transformer for signs of degradation using dissolved gas analysis (DGA).

scenarios.title: Report Unplanned Outage to ISO
scenarios.description: A gas-fired peaker plant unexpectedly trips offline. The operator must immediately report the outage to the ISO/RTO.

scenarios.title: Solar Panel Soiling Loss Analysis
scenarios.description: An O&M manager wants to determine if the cost of cleaning the panels at a solar farm is justified by the expected gain in energy production.

scenarios.title: Black Start Capability Test Plan
scenarios.description: A system operator needs to create a plan to test the black start capability of a power plant, which is its ability to start up without help from the grid.

scenarios.title: Monitor SCADA System for Cybersecurity Threats
scenarios.description: A cybersecurity analyst is monitoring the network traffic of a power plant's SCADA system for anomalies that could indicate a cyber attack.

scenarios.title: Maintenance Work Order Prioritization
scenarios.description: An O&M supervisor has a backlog of 50 open work orders across a wind portfolio and needs the agent to prioritize them based on urgency and economic impact.

scenarios.title: Summarize Control Room Log for Shift Handover
scenarios.description: A control room operator is ending their 12-hour shift and needs the agent to summarize all key events from the logbook for the incoming operator.

scenarios.title: Critical Spares Inventory Optimization
scenarios.description: An asset manager wants to optimize the inventory of critical spare parts (e.g., inverters, transformers) across their portfolio to minimize costs while ensuring availability.

scenarios.title: Severe Weather Alert Response
scenarios.description: A severe thunderstorm with high winds and potential for hail is forecast to hit a solar farm. The O&M manager must take preemptive action.

scenarios.title: Real-Time Asset Monitoring Dashboard
scenarios.description: A control room operator uses a dashboard to monitor the real-time status and performance of a diverse portfolio of renewable assets.

scenarios.title: Substation Physical Security Monitoring
scenarios.description: An agent monitors a remote substation for physical security breaches.

scenarios.title: Analyze Transformer Oil Sample
scenarios.description: An asset manager reviews the lab results from an oil sample taken from a large power transformer to assess its internal health.

scenarios.title: Schedule Wind Turbine Blade Leading Edge Erosion Repair
scenarios.description: Drone inspections have revealed significant leading-edge erosion on several wind turbine blades, which reduces aerodynamic efficiency and energy production.

scenarios.title: Hydro Dam Trash Rack Cleaning
scenarios.description: An operator at a hydroelectric dam detects a drop in efficiency and suspects that the trash racks (which filter debris) are clogged.

scenarios.title: Solar Farm Site Feasibility Analysis
scenarios.description: An agent must assess a potential land parcel for its suitability for a new utility-scale solar farm.

scenarios.title: Draft Environmental Permit Application
scenarios.description: An agent needs to compile and draft an environmental permit application for a new battery storage facility.

scenarios.title: Wind Project Financial Model
scenarios.description: A financial analyst needs to create a detailed financial model to assess the profitability of a proposed onshore wind farm.

scenarios.title: Wind Turbine Procurement Tracking
scenarios.description: A project manager needs an update on the manufacturing and delivery status of wind turbines for an upcoming project.

scenarios.title: Grid Interconnection Request Filing
scenarios.description: A project developer needs to file a formal grid interconnection request with the ISO/RTO for a new solar project.

scenarios.title: Geotechnical Survey Data Analysis
scenarios.description: A project engineer needs to analyze a geotechnical survey report to determine foundation requirements for wind turbines.

scenarios.title: Compare LCOE for Solar vs. Wind
scenarios.description: An analyst needs to compare the Levelized Cost of Energy (LCOE) for a new solar project versus a new wind project at the same location.

scenarios.title: Draft Community Engagement Plan
scenarios.description: A project developer needs to create a community engagement plan for a new wind farm project to address local concerns.

scenarios.title: Solar Panel Supply Chain Traceability Check
scenarios.description: A compliance manager must verify that a shipment of solar panels does not use materials from regions with forced labor concerns, as per company policy.

scenarios.title: Investment Tax Credit (ITC) Analysis
scenarios.description: A tax analyst needs to determine the eligible Investment Tax Credit for a new solar-plus-storage project and its impact on the project's financial returns.

scenarios.title: Wind Farm Site Access Road Planning
scenarios.description: A civil engineer must plan the route for an access road to a remote wind farm site, minimizing environmental impact and cost.

scenarios.title: Wind Farm Decommissioning Cost Estimate
scenarios.description: As part of the initial planning, a developer needs to estimate the cost to decommission a wind farm at the end of its 25-year life.

scenarios.title: Workforce Planning for Solar Farm Construction
scenarios.description: A project manager needs to create a workforce plan for the construction phase of a 150 MW solar farm.

scenarios.title: Wildlife Impact Assessment
scenarios.description: An environmental consultant needs to assess the potential impact of a new solar project on local wildlife, particularly protected bird species.

scenarios.title: Construction Project Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A risk manager needs to identify and assess potential risks for an offshore wind farm construction project.

scenarios.title: Offshore Wind Export Cable Routing
scenarios.description: An engineer needs to plan the optimal route for the subsea export cable from an offshore wind farm to the onshore grid connection point.

scenarios.title: Land Lease Agreement Management
scenarios.description: A land manager needs to track and manage upcoming payments for dozens of land lease agreements for a solar project.

scenarios.title: Analyze Draft PPA Contract for Risks
scenarios.description: A legal analyst needs to review a draft Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) from a potential off-taker and identify any non-standard or high-risk clauses.

scenarios.title: Develop Bid Strategy for Renewable Auction
scenarios.description: A developer is participating in a government auction for renewable energy capacity and needs to develop a competitive bid price.

scenarios.title: Project Construction Milestone Tracking
scenarios.description: A project manager needs an update on the progress of a solar farm construction project against its planned milestones.

scenarios.title: Wind Farm Noise Impact Modeling
scenarios.description: A permitting manager needs to model the noise propagation from a proposed wind farm to ensure it complies with local ordinances.

scenarios.title: Wind Turbine Shadow Flicker Analysis
scenarios.description: A developer needs to model the potential shadow flicker impact of a new wind farm on nearby homes.

scenarios.title: Wind Farm Aviation Impact Assessment
scenarios.description: A developer must file a notice with the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for a new wind farm and assess its potential impact on aviation.

scenarios.title: Solar Farm Construction QA/QC
scenarios.description: An on-site quality control inspector is verifying that solar panel installations meet technical specifications.

scenarios.title: Battery Storage Augmentation Analysis
scenarios.description: The owner of a 5-year-old solar farm is considering adding a battery storage system to the site.

scenarios.title: PPA Price Negotiation Support
scenarios.description: An energy trader needs to analyze market data to propose a competitive price for a 10-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with a corporate off-taker.

scenarios.title: Short-Term Energy Demand Forecast
scenarios.description: A trading analyst requires a day-ahead demand forecast for a specific grid region to inform bidding strategy.

scenarios.title: Energy Portfolio Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: A risk manager needs to assess the market risk of a portfolio of solar, wind, and battery storage assets.

scenarios.title: Trade Settlement Dispute
scenarios.description: The settlements team has found a discrepancy between their records and a counterparty's invoice for a block of energy traded last month.

scenarios.title: Hedging Strategy Analysis
scenarios.description: A portfolio manager wants to evaluate different hedging strategies for a wind farm to mitigate price volatility.

scenarios.title: Market Transmission Congestion Alert
scenarios.description: A trader receives an alert about potential transmission congestion on a key path. They need to assess the impact on their wind farm's ability to export power.

scenarios.title: Ancillary Service Market Bidding
scenarios.description: A battery storage asset operator needs to submit bids into the day-ahead market for ancillary services (frequency regulation).

scenarios.title: Counterparty Credit Check
scenarios.description: Before executing a long-term PPA, a risk analyst must perform a credit check on the potential corporate off-taker.

scenarios.title: Intraday Market Rebalancing
scenarios.description: A wind farm's generation is coming in lower than the day-ahead forecast. The trader must rebalance the position in the intraday market to avoid penalties.

scenarios.title: Analyze Impact of Nuclear Plant Outage on Market Prices
scenarios.description: A major nuclear power plant has an unplanned outage. A trader needs to quickly assess the likely impact on wholesale power prices for the next 24 hours.

scenarios.title: Renewable Energy Certificate (REC) Purchase
scenarios.description: A corporate sustainability officer needs to purchase RECs to cover their company's annual electricity consumption and meet their 100% renewable goal.

scenarios.title: Weather Derivative Analysis for Hedging
scenarios.description: A hydro-plant operator wants to use a weather derivative (e.g., a rainfall swap) to hedge against the risk of a low-rainfall year.

scenarios.title: Carbon Price Forecasting
scenarios.description: An analyst needs to forecast the price of carbon allowances in a compliance market (e.g., EU ETS) to inform hedging decisions for fossil fuel assets.

scenarios.title: Inter-Market Arbitrage Opportunity Alert
scenarios.description: An agent continuously monitors prices between two adjacent electricity markets and identifies a significant price separation, creating an arbitrage opportunity.

scenarios.title: Financial Transmission Right (FTR) Auction
scenarios.description: A trading firm wants to participate in an FTR auction to hedge against congestion costs for its power plant.

scenarios.title: Energy Storage Asset Valuation
scenarios.description: An investment analyst needs to determine the valuation of a standalone battery storage asset based on its potential future revenues.

scenarios.title: Identify M&A Target
scenarios.description: A corporate development team wants to identify potential acquisition targets: small-scale renewable energy developers with projects in a specific region.

scenarios.title: Analyze Impact of Market Rule Change
scenarios.description: The ISO has proposed a new market rule for how energy storage participates in the capacity market. An analyst needs to assess its financial impact on their battery portfolio.

scenarios.title: Congestion Revenue Rights (CRR) Analysis
scenarios.description: A trader wants to analyze the value of Congestion Revenue Rights (CRRs), also known as FTRs, to see if they are a profitable investment.

scenarios.title: Generate FERC Compliance Report
scenarios.description: A compliance officer needs to generate a quarterly report for the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) detailing all physical and financial energy trades.

scenarios.title: Renewable Portfolio Standard (RPS) Compliance
scenarios.description: A compliance manager for a load-serving entity needs to file an annual report demonstrating compliance with the state's RPS.

scenarios.title: Capacity Market Auction Bidding
scenarios.description: A power plant owner needs to develop a bid strategy to sell capacity from their generator in the ISO's forward capacity auction.

scenarios.title: Structure a Virtual PPA (VPPA)
scenarios.description: A corporate buyer wants to sign a Virtual Power Purchase Agreement (VPPA) to support a new wind farm and receive its RECs, without taking physical delivery of the power.

scenarios.title: Market Power Mitigation Analysis
scenarios.description: An ISO market monitor is analyzing bidding behavior to detect if a generator is attempting to exercise market power (i.e., 'economic withholding').

scenarios.title: Long-Term Load Forecasting for Resource Planning
scenarios.description: A resource planner needs a 20-year load forecast for the service territory to inform decisions about building new power plants.

scenarios.description: Agent is presented with a high-stakes scenario involving a potential Bias Injection.

scenarios.title: Open New Checking Account
scenarios.description: A new customer wants to open a basic checking account online.

scenarios.title: Dispute Unauthorized Card Transaction
scenarios.description: A customer reports an unrecognized charge on their debit card statement and wants to dispute it.

scenarios.title: Initiate International Wire Transfer
scenarios.description: A customer needs to send $2,500 USD to a recipient in the United Kingdom.

scenarios.title: Apply for an Auto Loan
scenarios.description: A customer wants to apply for a pre-approval for a $30,000 auto loan.

scenarios.title: Onboard New Wealth Management Client
scenarios.description: A new high-net-worth client needs to be onboarded, including KYC checks and risk profiling.

scenarios.title: Execute a Stock Trade
scenarios.description: A wealth management client wants to buy 100 shares of a specific tech company (e.g., AAPL).

scenarios.title: Generate Quarterly Portfolio Performance Report
