scenarios.title: Enroll Patient in Care Management
scenarios.description: A patient identified as high-risk needs to be enrolled in a care management program.

scenarios.title: Manage a Patient's Care Team
scenarios.description: A care manager needs to add a new home health nurse to a patient's official care team.

scenarios.title: Stratify Patient Risk by Condition
scenarios.description: An analyst wants to view the risk scores for all patients with asthma, broken down by risk level (low, medium, high).

scenarios.title: Analyze Provider Performance
scenarios.description: A medical director wants to compare the performance of different primary care providers on key quality measures.

scenarios.title: Send Automated Appointment Confirmation
scenarios.description: A patient schedules an appointment online. The system needs to automatically send them a confirmation.

scenarios.title: Track Referral Status
scenarios.description: A care coordinator needs to check if a patient ever scheduled their appointment with the specialist they were referred to.

scenarios.title: Flag Patient for Intervention
scenarios.description: A risk model identifies a patient whose risk score has significantly increased. The system needs to flag them for intervention.

scenarios.title: View Patient Cost and Utilization
scenarios.description: A care manager is reviewing a high-risk patient and wants to see their healthcare cost and utilization over the past year.

scenarios.title: Send Patient Satisfaction Survey
scenarios.description: Twenty-four hours after a patient's appointment, the system automatically sends them a satisfaction survey.

scenarios.title: Document in a Shared Care Plan
scenarios.description: A home health nurse visits a patient and needs to add a note to the shared care plan that is visible to the patient's PCP and other specialists.

scenarios.title: Add Patient to Disease Registry
scenarios.description: A patient is newly diagnosed with diabetes. The system needs to automatically add them to the diabetes disease registry.

scenarios.title: Generate Patient List for Outreach
scenarios.description: A care manager needs a list of all high-risk asthma patients who have had an ED visit in the last 6 months.

scenarios.title: Plan Major Equipment Shutdown
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner needs to schedule a 10-day major overhaul for a primary crusher at a mine site, coordinating all required resources.

scenarios.title: Analyze Asset Failure Data
scenarios.description: A reliability engineer is analyzing frequent failures of a specific type of gearbox to find the root cause and improve its maintenance strategy.

scenarios.title: Commission a New Asset
scenarios.description: A new conveyor belt system has been installed. A commissioning engineer must run it through a series of tests before it can be handed over to operations.

scenarios.title: Order a Critical Spare Part
scenarios.description: A critical, long-lead-time spare part (e.g., a large motor) has been used from inventory. A planner must order a replacement to maintain readiness.

scenarios.title: Diagnose Hydraulic System Failure
scenarios.description: The hydraulic system on a large excavator is operating sluggishly. A maintenance technician must diagnose the problem.

scenarios.title: Close Out a Punch List Item
scenarios.description: A contractor reports they have fixed a punch list item (e.g., a leaking valve). A commissioning engineer must verify the fix and close the item.

scenarios.title: Analyze Asset Vibration Data
scenarios.description: A predictive maintenance system has flagged high vibration levels on a large industrial fan. A reliability engineer must analyze the data.

scenarios.title: Create New Asset in Maintenance System
scenarios.description: A new pump has been installed. It needs to be created as a new asset in the maintenance management system.

scenarios.title: Retire an Old Asset
scenarios.description: A piece of machinery has reached the end of its life and needs to be formally retired and removed from the asset register.

scenarios.title: Schedule a Lubrication Route
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner needs to schedule a weekly lubrication route for a maintenance technician.

scenarios.title: Decommission and Dispose of an Asset
scenarios.description: An old, retired tank needs to be cleaned, decommissioned, and sent for scrap.

scenarios.title: Manage Asset Warranty Claim
scenarios.description: A new piece of equipment has failed within its warranty period. A maintenance manager must file a warranty claim with the vendor.

scenarios.title: Perform Oil Analysis
scenarios.description: As part of a predictive maintenance program, an oil sample has been taken from a large gearbox. The sample needs to be analyzed for wear metals.

scenarios.title: Calculate Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO)
scenarios.description: An accountant needs to calculate the Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) for a large piece of mining equipment, which is the estimated future cost to dismantle and dispose of it.

scenarios.title: Update Asset Location
scenarios.description: A mobile piece of equipment, like a generator, has been moved to a new location on the project site. Its location must be updated in the asset register.

scenarios.title: Plan a Plant Turnaround Event
scenarios.description: A shutdown planner is developing the master plan for a major plant turnaround, which involves hundreds of individual work orders.

scenarios.title: Check Asset Maintenance History
scenarios.description: Before purchasing a used piece of heavy equipment, a manager wants to review its maintenance history.

scenarios.title: Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on Failure
scenarios.description: Following a major equipment failure, a reliability engineer leads an RCA session to prevent recurrence.

scenarios.title: Manage Equipment Calibration
scenarios.description: A critical torque wrench used for bolt tensioning is due for its annual calibration.

scenarios.title: Review Monthly Asset Performance
scenarios.description: A plant manager is reviewing the monthly performance report for critical assets.

scenarios.title: Create Bill of Materials for an Asset
scenarios.description: A new asset has been created, and a planner needs to build its Bill of Materials (BOM) of spare parts in the maintenance system.

scenarios.title: Manage Asset Decontamination
scenarios.description: A piece of equipment that was in radioactive service needs to be decontaminated before it can be sent for repair.

scenarios.title: Manage Asset Operating Strategy
scenarios.description: A reliability engineer is reviewing the overall maintenance and operating strategy for a critical asset to ensure it is optimized for performance and life.

scenarios.title: Manage Asset Transfer Between Sites
scenarios.description: A piece of mobile equipment (e.g., a crane) is being permanently transferred from one project site to another.

scenarios.title: Perform Asset Condition Monitoring
scenarios.description: A technician is performing a routine condition monitoring route, collecting data from various assets.

scenarios.title: Resolve Design Clash in 3D Model
scenarios.description: An automated clash detection report from the 3D model shows a newly designed pipe rack interfering with an existing structural beam.

scenarios.title: Update Drawing with As-Built Redlines
scenarios.description: The field team has returned a 'red-line' drawing showing a minor change made during construction. A designer must update the official CAD drawing.

scenarios.title: Perform Material Take-Off (MTO)
scenarios.description: An engineer needs to perform a material take-off from a set of design drawings to create a bill of materials for procurement.

scenarios.title: Review Vendor Design Document
scenarios.description: A vendor has submitted a design drawing for a custom-built piece of equipment. An engineer must review it to ensure it meets project specifications.

scenarios.title: Perform Structural Steel Simulation
scenarios.description: A structural engineer needs to perform a finite element analysis (FEA) on a complex steel connection to verify it can handle the design loads.

scenarios.title: Manage Transmittal of Documents
scenarios.description: A set of new design drawings needs to be formally transmitted to the client for their review and approval.

scenarios.title: Perform Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA)
scenarios.description: An engineer is leading an FMEA session for a new piece of heavy machinery to proactively identify and mitigate potential failure modes.

scenarios.title: Check Drawing Against Company Standard
scenarios.description: A junior designer has completed a new drawing. A senior designer must check it to ensure it complies with the company's drafting standards.

scenarios.title: Create a Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID)
scenarios.description: A process engineer needs to create a new P&ID for a simple chemical dosing system.

scenarios.title: Define an Inspection and Test Plan (ITP)
scenarios.description: A quality engineer needs to create an ITP for the fabrication of a new pressure vessel, outlining all required quality checks.

scenarios.title: Select Material for Corrosive Service
scenarios.description: A mechanical engineer is designing a tank for storing a corrosive chemical and must select an appropriate, cost-effective material.

scenarios.title: Review Geotechnical Report
scenarios.description: A civil engineer needs to review the geotechnical report for a site to determine the required foundation design for a new building.

scenarios.title: Issue Drawing for Construction
scenarios.description: A design drawing has passed its final review and needs to be formally issued for construction.

scenarios.title: Create a Datasheet for an Instrument
scenarios.description: An instrumentation engineer needs to create a technical datasheet for a new pressure transmitter that will be sent to vendors for quotes.

scenarios.title: Check for Design Standard Updates
scenarios.description: Before starting a new design, an engineer must check if any of the relevant industry design codes (e.g., ASME, API) have been updated.

scenarios.title: Create 3D Model of a Site
scenarios.description: A surveyor has captured point cloud data of an existing facility. A designer needs to convert this into a 3D CAD model.

scenarios.title: Manage Drawing Revisions
scenarios.description: An engineer has made a change to a drawing. The document controller must ensure it is issued as a new revision.

scenarios.title: Perform Pipe Stress Analysis
scenarios.description: A piping engineer needs to perform a stress analysis on a high-temperature pipeline to ensure it can expand safely without failing.

scenarios.title: Release Document for Fabrication
scenarios.description: A detailed drawing for a steel structure is complete and needs to be sent to a fabrication shop.

scenarios.title: Create a Demolition Plan
scenarios.description: An old structure needs to be demolished. An engineer must create a safe demolition plan.

scenarios.title: Create a Piping Isometric Drawing
scenarios.description: A piping designer needs to create an isometric drawing (iso) for a single pipeline, which will be used by the fabrication shop.

scenarios.title: Manage Design Assumptions
scenarios.description: During early design, an engineer has to make an assumption (e.g., about soil conditions) that must be documented and tracked for later verification.

scenarios.title: Manage a Design Interface Point
scenarios.description: One engineering discipline (electrical) needs to provide information (power requirements) to another discipline (mechanical) for them to complete their design.

scenarios.title: Manage Welder Qualifications
scenarios.description: A quality manager needs to verify that a welder is qualified to perform a specific type of weld before they start work.

scenarios.title: Manage a Design Change Notice (DCN)
scenarios.description: A design change is required after a drawing has already been issued. A formal DCN must be created to track the change.

scenarios.title: Request a Hot Work Permit
scenarios.description: A field crew needs to perform welding in an operational area and must obtain a hot work permit from the site safety office.

scenarios.title: Perform Concrete Slump Test
scenarios.description: A concrete truck has arrived on site. A field inspector must perform a slump test to ensure the concrete meets the project's workability specifications before it can be poured.

scenarios.title: Manage Site Laydown Area
scenarios.description: A large piece of equipment (a pressure vessel) is arriving on site and the logistics coordinator must assign it a space in the laydown yard.

scenarios.title: Conduct Daily Toolbox Talk
scenarios.description: A construction supervisor needs to conduct a daily safety toolbox talk for their crew before work begins.

scenarios.title: Manage a Heavy Lift Operation
scenarios.description: A very large and heavy module needs to be lifted into place by a crane. The site supervisor must ensure all safety and operational checks are complete.

scenarios.title: Perform Welding Inspection
scenarios.description: A quality inspector needs to perform a visual inspection of a completed weld on a structural beam.

scenarios.title: Manage a Drilling Operation
scenarios.description: A mine supervisor is monitoring a drilling operation and needs to ensure the drill is following the planned pattern.

scenarios.title: Report Environmental Exceedance
scenarios.description: A water quality sensor at a site's discharge point shows a pH level outside the permitted range. The site environmental officer must report it.

scenarios.title: Request Material from Site Warehouse
scenarios.description: A field supervisor needs to request a pallet of cement from the on-site warehouse for the next day's work.

scenarios.title: Request an Excavation Permit
scenarios.description: A crew needs to excavate a trench for a new pipeline. They must first get an excavation permit, which includes a check for underground utilities.

scenarios.title: Install Heavy Machinery
scenarios.description: A field crew needs to install and align a large industrial motor and pump set.

scenarios.title: Perform Hydrostatic Test on Pipeline
scenarios.description: A new pipeline has been built and must be hydrostatically tested to ensure it is leak-free before being put into service.

scenarios.title: Report a Safety Incident
scenarios.description: A worker has suffered a minor injury on site. The site supervisor must log an incident report.

scenarios.title: Track Personnel on Site
scenarios.description: During an emergency drill, a safety officer needs to get a headcount of all personnel at the designated muster points.

scenarios.title: Perform Soil Compaction Test
scenarios.description: After a layer of fill has been placed for a new road, a field technician must test its compaction using a nuclear density gauge.

scenarios.title: Manage a Large Concrete Pour
scenarios.description: A supervisor is managing a large, continuous concrete pour for a building foundation and must track the trucks and volumes.

scenarios.title: Perform Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) on a Weld
scenarios.description: A critical weld requires ultrasonic testing (UT) to check for internal defects.

scenarios.title: Complete Daily Construction Report
scenarios.description: At the end of the day, a field engineer needs to complete the daily report, summarizing work completed, resources used, and any issues.

scenarios.title: Track Equipment Operating Hours
scenarios.description: A supervisor needs to log the daily operating hours for a piece of heavy equipment (e.g., a bulldozer) for maintenance tracking.

scenarios.title: Resolve a Field Query
scenarios.description: A construction crew has encountered an unforeseen underground obstruction and needs guidance from engineering.

scenarios.title: Manage Scaffolding Request
scenarios.description: A crew needs scaffolding erected to access a work area at height.

scenarios.title: Request Surveying Services
scenarios.description: A crew is ready to lay out the foundations for a new structure and needs a survey team to stake out the building corners.

scenarios.title: Confirm Rebar Placement
scenarios.description: Before a concrete pour, an inspector must verify that the reinforcing steel (rebar) has been placed correctly according to the drawings.

scenarios.title: Manage Site Access Request
scenarios.description: A new subcontractor employee needs to be granted access to the construction site.

scenarios.title: Investigate Property Damage Incident
scenarios.description: A truck has backed into and damaged a fence on the project site. The incident must be investigated.

scenarios.title: Analyze Project Schedule Delay
scenarios.description: A critical path activity, 'Foundation Curing', is delayed due to adverse weather. The project manager must assess the impact on the overall project milestone for 'Steel Erection'.

scenarios.title: Process Subcontractor Progress Invoice
scenarios.description: A subcontractor has submitted an invoice for work completed last month. The project controls team must verify the progress claimed before approving payment.

scenarios.title: Create a Request for Information (RFI)
scenarios.description: A contractor on site has a question about a design drawing and needs clarification from the engineering team. A formal RFI must be logged.

scenarios.title: Generate Monthly Project Progress Report
scenarios.description: A project manager needs to generate the official monthly progress report for project stakeholders.

scenarios.title: Evaluate Bid from Contractor
scenarios.description: The project has received three bids for the electrical installation package. The procurement manager must evaluate them and recommend a winner.

scenarios.title: Forecast Project Cost at Completion
scenarios.description: A project controls engineer needs to update the Estimate at Completion (EAC) for the project based on the latest performance data.

scenarios.title: Manage a Project Risk
scenarios.description: A project manager identifies a new risk: a potential strike at the port could delay a critical equipment delivery. This risk must be logged and managed.

scenarios.title: Process a Change Order Request
scenarios.description: The client has requested a change to the project scope (e.g., adding a new building). A project manager must create a formal change order.

scenarios.title: Track Critical Material Delivery
scenarios.description: A project expediter needs to track the status of a shipment of custom-fabricated steel to ensure it arrives on time.

scenarios.title: Update Project Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)
scenarios.description: Due to a change in construction strategy, a new work package needs to be added to the project's Work Breakdown Structure (WBS).

scenarios.title: Log Project Meeting Minutes
scenarios.description: Following the weekly project review meeting, the project administrator needs to log the meeting minutes and track the new action items.

scenarios.title: Procure Bulk Material (Concrete)
scenarios.description: A project needs to procure 10,000 cubic meters of concrete for its foundation work. A procurement manager must issue a purchase order.

scenarios.title: Manage Project Resource Allocation
scenarios.description: A project manager sees that a key engineer is overallocated for the next month and must reassign some of their tasks.

scenarios.title: Approve a Contractor Submittal
scenarios.description: A contractor has submitted a document for approval (e.g., a safety plan or a technical procedure). A project engineer must review and approve it.

scenarios.title: Manage Final Project Documentation
scenarios.description: As a project nears completion, a document controller must assemble the final handover package of all drawings, manuals, and certificates for the client.

scenarios.title: Create Initial Project Budget
scenarios.description: A project is being initiated, and a cost engineer needs to create the initial budget based on the conceptual estimate.

scenarios.title: Close Out a Project
scenarios.description: A project is complete. The project manager must perform the final administrative steps to formally close it.

scenarios.title: Manage a Project Budget Transfer
scenarios.description: The civil engineering work package is trending under budget, and the project manager wants to transfer some of its budget to the mechanical work package, which is over budget.

scenarios.title: Manage Project Schedule Baseline
scenarios.description: A project has been approved and the project manager needs to set the initial schedule as the official baseline for performance measurement.

scenarios.title: Track Contractor Submittal Status
scenarios.description: A project manager wants to know the status of a critical submittal that was sent to engineering for review.

scenarios.title: Manage Project Contingency Budget
scenarios.description: An unforeseen issue has resulted in extra costs. The project manager needs to request a drawdown from the project's contingency budget.

scenarios.title: Track Project Earned Value
scenarios.description: A project controls engineer needs to calculate the earned value for a work package to assess its performance.

scenarios.title: Procure a Piece of Heavy Equipment
scenarios.description: A mining project needs to purchase a new haul truck. The procurement manager must manage the process.

scenarios.title: Create a Work Package
scenarios.description: A construction manager is breaking down a large part of the project into a smaller, manageable work package to be issued to a field supervisor.

scenarios.title: Compare Actual vs. Planned Schedule
scenarios.description: A project planner is analyzing schedule performance by comparing the actual progress against the original baseline.

scenarios.title: Create Weekly Staff Schedule
scenarios.description: A front office manager needs to create the staff schedule for the upcoming week.

scenarios.title: Process a Vendor Invoice
scenarios.description: The accounting department receives an invoice from the hotel's linen supply vendor.

scenarios.title: Generate Daily Revenue Report
scenarios.description: The hotel's general manager needs the daily revenue report from yesterday.

scenarios.title: Fire Alarm Activation
scenarios.description: A fire alarm is activated in the hotel. The security or front office staff must execute the emergency response procedure.

scenarios.title: Handle Staff Shift Change Request
scenarios.description: An employee needs to swap shifts with a coworker.

scenarios.title: Onboard a New Vendor

scenarios.title: Run the Night Audit Process
scenarios.description: The night auditor needs to run the end-of-day process to close the day's business and prepare for the next.

scenarios.title: Investigate Security Camera Footage
scenarios.description: A guest reports that their car was scratched in the hotel parking lot. Security needs to review camera footage.

scenarios.title: Process Bi-weekly Payroll
scenarios.description: The HR manager needs to process the bi-weekly payroll for all hotel employees.

scenarios.title: Dispute a Vendor Invoice
scenarios.description: The accounting department notices they were overcharged on an invoice from a food supplier.

scenarios.title: Reconcile a Cash Drawer

scenarios.title: Guest Stuck in Elevator
scenarios.description: A guest uses the emergency phone in an elevator to report they are stuck.

scenarios.title: Employee Calls in Sick

scenarios.title: Negotiate a Vendor Contract Renewal
scenarios.description: The contract with the hotel's landscaping vendor is up for renewal, and the general manager wants to negotiate better terms.

scenarios.title: Handle a Credit Card Chargeback
scenarios.description: The hotel receives a chargeback notice from a credit card company; a former guest is disputing their entire stay's charges.

scenarios.title: Handle a Hotel Power Outage
scenarios.description: The hotel experiences a sudden power outage.

scenarios.title: Create New Employee Profile

scenarios.title: Provide Security Footage to Police
scenarios.description: The police have arrived with a warrant to obtain security camera footage related to an investigation.

scenarios.title: Respond to a Guest Medical Emergency
scenarios.description: A guest calls the front desk reporting a medical emergency (e.g., chest pains).

scenarios.title: Make a Restaurant Reservation
scenarios.description: A hotel guest wants to make a reservation for two people at the hotel's steakhouse tonight.

scenarios.title: Take Poolside Drink Order

scenarios.title: Take a Room Service Order
scenarios.description: A guest calls to order a club sandwich and a soda from room service.

scenarios.title: Finalize a Banquet Event Order (BEO)

scenarios.description: A company requests a proposal for their annual awards banquet, including a three-course meal and an open bar.

scenarios.description: A table of four guests asks their server to split the check evenly between them.

scenarios.title: Guest Requests Room Service Tray Pickup
scenarios.description: A guest calls to have their used room service tray removed from their room.

scenarios.title: Set up AV for a Meeting
scenarios.description: An event manager needs to ensure the audio-visual equipment is set up and working for a corporate meeting.

scenarios.title: Cancel a Restaurant Reservation
scenarios.description: A guest calls to cancel their dinner reservation for tonight.

scenarios.description: A guest complains to their server that their steak is overcooked.

scenarios.title: Inquire About Room Service Menu After Hours
scenarios.description: A guest calls late at night asking what is available from room service.

scenarios.description: On the morning of an event, the client calls to add 10 more guests to their banquet.

scenarios.title: Notify Guest Their Table is Ready

scenarios.description: A hotel guest dining at the on-site restaurant wants to charge their meal to their room.

scenarios.description: A VIP guest has requested a private dining experience in a separate room.

scenarios.title: New Room Reservation
scenarios.description: A guest calls to book a standard king room for two nights.

scenarios.title: Guest Check-in
scenarios.description: A guest with an existing reservation arrives to check in.

scenarios.title: Concierge Request - Dinner Reservation
scenarios.description: A guest requests assistance from the concierge to book a dinner reservation at a popular local restaurant.

scenarios.title: Billing Dispute on Folio
scenarios.description: A guest checking out is disputing a minibar charge on their bill, claiming they did not consume the item.

scenarios.title: Modify an Existing Reservation
scenarios.description: A guest calls to change the dates of their upcoming stay.

scenarios.title: Late Check-out Request
scenarios.description: A guest requests a late check-out.

scenarios.title: Concierge Request - Arrange Airport Transport
scenarios.description: A guest needs the concierge to arrange a car service to the airport for their departure tomorrow.

scenarios.title: Guest Check-out and Payment
scenarios.description: A guest is at the front desk to check out and settle their bill.

scenarios.title: Cancel a Reservation
scenarios.description: A guest calls to cancel their upcoming reservation.

scenarios.title: Guest Room Change Request
scenarios.description: A guest is unhappy with their room's location (e.g., too close to the elevator) and requests a different room.

scenarios.title: Concierge Request - Book Theater Tickets
scenarios.description: A guest wants the concierge to book two tickets for a popular musical.

scenarios.title: Change Investment Allocation in a Variable Annuity
scenarios.description: A contract holder wants to change their future contribution allocation to be more aggressive.

scenarios.title: Reissue Lost Policy Documents
scenarios.description: A life insurance policyholder has lost their physical policy contract and requests a duplicate copy.

scenarios.title: Reinstate a Lapsed Policy
scenarios.description: A customer's auto policy was cancelled for non-payment, and they are calling a few days later to reinstate it.

scenarios.title: Handle Rental Car Coverage on a Claim
scenarios.description: A customer's car is in the shop for a covered repair, and they need to arrange for a rental car under their policy.

scenarios.title: Review MVR for Policy Renewal
scenarios.description: An underwriter is reviewing an auto policy for renewal and runs a new Motor Vehicle Report (MVR).

scenarios.title: Waive a Late Fee
scenarios.description: A long-time customer with a good payment history requests to have a late fee waived as a one-time courtesy.

scenarios.title: Process a Full Policy Surrender
scenarios.description: A whole life policyholder wants to surrender their policy for its cash value.

scenarios.title: Handle a Contestable Life Insurance Claim
scenarios.description: A death claim has been filed on a policy that is still within the two-year contestability period.

scenarios.title: Process an Annuity Withdrawal
scenarios.description: An annuity holder requests a partial withdrawal from their contract.

scenarios.title: Bind a New Life Insurance Policy
scenarios.description: An applicant has been approved and has paid their first premium. The agent needs to officially bind the policy.

scenarios.title: Remove a Vehicle from an Auto Policy
scenarios.description: A policyholder sold a car and no longer needs it on their policy.

scenarios.title: Process a Homeowners Theft Claim
scenarios.description: A customer's home was burglarized, and they are filing a claim for stolen items.

scenarios.title: Quote Auto Insurance with a Poor Driving Record
scenarios.description: A potential customer with multiple accidents and tickets is requesting an auto insurance quote.

scenarios.title: Update Payment Method
scenarios.description: A customer's credit card on file has expired, and they need to update it for their recurring payments.

scenarios.title: Request a Duplicate Policy Document
scenarios.description: A policyholder has misplaced their physical life insurance policy and wants a new copy.

scenarios.title: Handle Unclaimed Property (Escheatment)
scenarios.description: A life insurance policy's death benefit was never claimed, and the funds must be turned over to the state as unclaimed property.

scenarios.title: Process a Required Minimum Distribution (RMD)
scenarios.description: An IRA holder held within an annuity has reached the age where they must begin taking RMDs.

scenarios.title: Withdraw a Life Insurance Application
scenarios.description: An applicant has changed their mind and wants to withdraw their pending life insurance application.

scenarios.title: Change Auto Insurance Deductible
scenarios.description: A customer wants to lower their monthly premium by raising their collision deductible.

scenarios.title: Handle a Claim Liability Dispute
scenarios.description: Both drivers in an accident are claiming the other was at fault. The adjuster must determine liability.

scenarios.title: Quote a Personal Umbrella Policy
scenarios.description: A high-net-worth customer wants a quote for a personal umbrella policy for extra liability protection.

scenarios.title: Apply a Renewal Credit
scenarios.description: A long-time customer with no claims is eligible for a loyalty credit on their policy renewal.

scenarios.title: Inquire About Policy Riders
scenarios.description: A policyholder wants to know what optional riders they have on their life insurance policy.

scenarios.title: Stop Payment on a Lost Claim Check
scenarios.description: A beneficiary reports that they lost their life insurance claim check and needs a new one.

scenarios.title: Change Ownership of an Annuity
scenarios.description: An annuity owner wants to transfer ownership of their non-qualified annuity to their child.

scenarios.title: Review Application for Potential Fraud
scenarios.description: An underwriter's automated system flags a new life insurance application for potential fraud.

scenarios.title: Process Policy Renewal Notice
scenarios.description: An auto policy is coming up for renewal, and the system needs to generate and send the renewal offer.

scenarios.title: Handle a Medical Payments Claim (Auto)
scenarios.description: A passenger in your insured's vehicle was slightly injured in an accident and needs to file a claim for their medical bills under the auto policy's MedPay coverage.

scenarios.title: Quote Policy for Customer with Prior Lapse
scenarios.description: A potential customer is requesting a quote but had a lapse in their previous insurance coverage.

scenarios.title: Process a Premium Refund
scenarios.description: A customer removed a vehicle from their policy, resulting in a credit balance that needs to be refunded.

scenarios.title: Inquire About Policy Cash Value
scenarios.description: A whole life policyholder wants to know the current cash value of their policy.

scenarios.title: Assign a Claim to an Adjuster
scenarios.description: A new, complex disability claim has been filed and needs to be assigned to a senior claims adjuster.

scenarios.title: Request Annuity Performance History
scenarios.description: A variable annuity holder wants to see the historical performance of their investment subaccounts.

scenarios.title: Correct an Error on an Application
scenarios.description: An agent made a typo in an applicant's date of birth on a life insurance application that is pending review.

scenarios.title: Add an Additional Insured
scenarios.description: A small business needs to add a client as an additional insured on their general liability policy for a specific project.

scenarios.title: Deny a Claim for a Non-Covered Peril
scenarios.description: A homeowner files a claim for damage caused by a flood, but their policy does not include flood coverage.

scenarios.title: Re-run Property Valuation at Renewal
scenarios.description: As part of a homeowner's policy renewal, the underwriter needs to run an updated replacement cost estimate for the home.

scenarios.title: Explain a Billing Statement
scenarios.description: A customer does not understand the charges on their most recent bill, which includes a policy change prorated amount.

scenarios.title: Change Policy Dividend Option
scenarios.description: A participating whole life policyholder wants to change their dividend option from 'Paid in Cash' to 'Purchase Paid-Up Additions'.

scenarios.title: Handle a Claim with Disputing Beneficiaries (Interpleader)
scenarios.description: Two beneficiaries of a life insurance policy are disputing who should receive the proceeds.

scenarios.title: Inquire About the Free Look Period
scenarios.description: A customer who just purchased an annuity wants to know if they can still cancel it without penalty.

scenarios.title: Order Medical Records for Underwriting
scenarios.description: An underwriter needs to order an Attending Physician's Statement (APS) to get more details on a condition disclosed in a life insurance application.

scenarios.title: Process Reinstatement with a Lapse in Coverage
scenarios.description: A customer's policy cancelled for non-payment more than 30 days ago and they now want to reinstate, which will create a lapse in coverage.

scenarios.title: Handle a Diminished Value Claim
scenarios.description: A third-party claimant is demanding payment for the diminished value of their vehicle after it was repaired following an accident with your insured.

scenarios.title: Review Policy for Rating Errors
scenarios.description: A customer believes their premium is too high and is asking for a review of their policy for any potential rating errors.

scenarios.title: Handle a Payment Plan Change
scenarios.description: A customer who pays quarterly wants to switch to a monthly payment plan.

scenarios.title: Multi-Turn Recursive Workflow: Level 7
scenarios.description: A deep, multi-step workflow requiring state persistence and recursive error handling.
