scenarios.description: A production coordinator needs to arrange transportation for a 50-person film crew to a remote shooting location.

scenarios.title: Handle Account Takeover Support Request
scenarios.description: A user reports they can no longer access their streaming account and suspect it has been taken over by someone else.

scenarios.title: Check Video Ad for Compliance
scenarios.description: A new ad creative from an advertiser needs to be checked against technical and content policies before it can be used in campaigns.

scenarios.title: Migrate Players to a New Server
scenarios.description: A game is retiring an old server and needs to migrate all players and their data to a new, more powerful server.

scenarios.title: Review VFX Shot for Approval
scenarios.description: A VFX artist has submitted a new version of a complex visual effects shot for the director's approval.

scenarios.title: Identify Top Performing Content of the Month
scenarios.description: A content manager wants a report on the top 10 most-watched movies and TV shows on the streaming platform for the previous month.

scenarios.title: Handle Live Sports Rain Delay
scenarios.description: A live broadcast of a baseball game is interrupted by a rain delay. The agent must switch to filler content.

scenarios.title: Compensate Players for Server Outage
scenarios.description: After a prolonged server outage, the company decides to give all affected players a small gift of in-game currency as an apology.

scenarios.title: Clear Film Clip License for a Documentary
scenarios.description: A documentary filmmaker wants to use a 30-second clip from a classic movie. An agent must secure the license.

scenarios.title: Update User Content Preferences
scenarios.description: A user wants to update their content preferences to get better recommendations.

scenarios.title: Resolve Audio Description Track Issue
scenarios.description: A visually impaired user reports that the audio description track for a TV show is silent.

scenarios.title: Investigate DDoS Attack on Game Login Server
scenarios.description: The system alerts that a game's login server is under a DDoS attack, preventing players from logging in.

scenarios.title: Book an ADR Session for an Actor
scenarios.description: A director has requested an Automated Dialogue Replacement (ADR) session for an actor to re-record some lines of dialogue.

scenarios.title: Handle Free Trial to Paid Subscription Conversion
scenarios.description: A user's free trial is about to end, and the system needs to automatically convert them to a paid subscription.

scenarios.title: Troubleshoot High Latency on a Live Stream
scenarios.description: Viewers are complaining that a live stream has a very long delay (latency) compared to the real-world event.

scenarios.title: Player Appeals a Ban
scenarios.description: A player who was banned for toxic behavior submits an appeal, claiming they have reformed.

scenarios.title: Track a Shipment of Hard Drives
scenarios.description: A production needs to track a shipment of hard drives containing raw footage being sent from a location shoot back to the studio.

scenarios.title: User Hits Multi-Device Streaming Limit
scenarios.description: A user tries to start a stream but receives an error because too many devices are already streaming on their account.

scenarios.title: Update On-Screen Graphics During Live Broadcast
scenarios.description: During a live sports broadcast, the score is incorrect on the on-screen graphic. An agent must correct it immediately.

scenarios.title: Plan a Game Server Merge
scenarios.description: Two game servers with low player populations need to be merged to improve the matchmaking experience.

scenarios.title: Generate Dubbing Script for Foreign Language
scenarios.description: A TV show needs to be dubbed into German. An agent must generate a time-coded script for the German voice actors.

scenarios.title: Target Lapsed Subscribers with a New Show
scenarios.description: A new season of a very popular show is launching. An agent needs to target lapsed subscribers who previously watched that show with a 'come back' offer.

scenarios.title: Handle Copyright Claim on a User's Live Stream
scenarios.description: During a user's live stream on a platform like Twitch, an automated system detects copyrighted music being played in the background and issues a copyright strike.

scenarios.title: Resolve In-Game Guild Dispute
scenarios.description: The leader of a guild (a player group) reports that a disruptive member is stealing from the shared guild bank.

scenarios.title: Book Travel for Film Festival
scenarios.description: A film has been accepted into an international film festival. An agent needs to book flights and hotels for the director and two lead actors.

scenarios.title: Process Refund for Accidental Purchase
scenarios.description: A user accidentally purchased a movie on a VOD service and immediately requests a refund.

scenarios.title: Manage Regional Sports Programming
scenarios.description: A national broadcaster needs to show different live games in different cities based on regional broadcast rights.

scenarios.title: Roll Back a Failed Game Patch
scenarios.description: A new game patch has introduced a critical bug causing widespread crashes. The patch must be rolled back immediately.

scenarios.title: Update Geological Block Model
scenarios.description: A resource geologist incorporates new drillhole assay data into the geological block model to refine the resource estimate.

scenarios.title: Plan Exploration Drilling Program
scenarios.description: An exploration geologist plans a diamond drilling program to test a new geophysical anomaly for potential mineralization.

scenarios.title: Log Exploration Drill Core
scenarios.description: A geologist logs exploration drill core, recording rock type, alteration, mineralization, and structural data.

scenarios.title: Monitor Open Pit Slope Stability
scenarios.description: A geotechnical engineer analyzes data from a slope monitoring radar to detect any movement in the pit walls that could indicate a potential failure.

scenarios.title: Perform Geotechnical Face Mapping
scenarios.description: A geotechnical engineer maps the structural features (e.g., joints, faults) on a newly exposed pit wall or underground tunnel face.

scenarios.title: Perform Grade Control Modeling
scenarios.description: A grade control geologist uses data from blast drillholes to create a short-term grade model to guide mining.

scenarios.title: Analyze Soil Geochemical Data
scenarios.description: An exploration geologist analyzes data from a soil sampling survey to identify anomalies that could indicate buried mineralization.

scenarios.title: Model Major Structural Faults
scenarios.description: A mine geologist models the major faults in a deposit, as they can control mineralization and impact rock stability.

scenarios.title: Manage QA/QC for Lab Assays
scenarios.description: A geologist manages the Quality Assurance/Quality Control (QA/QC) program for drill samples by submitting standards, blanks, and duplicates to the lab.

scenarios.title: Interpret Airborne Geophysical Survey
scenarios.description: A geophysicist interprets data from an airborne magnetic survey to identify geological structures that might host mineralization.

scenarios.title: Manage Drilling Contractor Performance
scenarios.description: An exploration manager reviews the performance of a drilling contractor to ensure they are meeting their contractual obligations.

scenarios.title: Create Lithology Model
scenarios.description: A geologist creates a 3D model of the different rock types (lithologies) in a deposit, which is fundamental for all other mine planning.

scenarios.title: Manage Sample Dispatch to Lab
scenarios.description: A geology technician prepares a batch of drill samples to be shipped from the mine site to an external laboratory for analysis.

scenarios.title: Report Minor Safety Incident
scenarios.description: A miner reports a minor incident (a slip, trip, or fall with no injury) using a mobile app to ensure it is logged and investigated.

scenarios.title: Manage Water Quality Monitoring
scenarios.description: An environmental officer checks the latest water quality monitoring data to ensure the mine is compliant with its discharge permit.

scenarios.title: Issue Permit for Confined Space Entry
scenarios.description: A supervisor needs to issue a permit for a maintenance crew to enter a large tank (a confined space) to perform repairs.

scenarios.title: Manage Mine Dewatering System
scenarios.description: An environmental engineer manages the mine's dewatering system to prevent flooding in the pit while ensuring discharged water meets quality standards.

scenarios.title: Conduct Workplace Safety Inspection
scenarios.description: A safety officer conducts a planned inspection of a maintenance workshop using a digital checklist on a tablet.

scenarios.title: Manage Haul Road Dust Suppression
scenarios.description: An environmental officer manages the water trucks to ensure haul roads are kept damp to suppress dust.

scenarios.title: Manage Emergency Response Drill
scenarios.description: An HSE superintendent runs a simulated emergency drill (e.g., a fire in the processing plant) to test the site's emergency response team.

scenarios.title: Manage Operator Fatigue
scenarios.description: A dispatcher uses a fatigue monitoring system to detect when a haul truck operator may be drowsy and need a break.

scenarios.title: Manage Mine Rehabilitation
scenarios.description: An environmental officer plans and monitors the rehabilitation of an old waste dump, which involves reshaping it and planting vegetation.

scenarios.title: Conduct Occupational Noise Survey
scenarios.description: An occupational hygienist conducts a noise survey in the processing plant to ensure workers are not exposed to harmful noise levels.

scenarios.title: Track Greenhouse Gas Emissions
scenarios.description: An environmental officer tracks the mine's greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions to report them and identify reduction opportunities.

scenarios.title: Manage Biodiversity and Land Clearing
scenarios.description: Before clearing land for a new waste dump, an environmental officer surveys the area for protected species.

scenarios.title: Manage Post-Blast Fume Clearance
scenarios.description: After a blast in an underground mine, a ventilation officer must ensure that toxic fumes (like NOx) are cleared before allowing personnel to re-enter the area.

scenarios.title: Manage Cultural Heritage Site
scenarios.description: During land clearing, a potential cultural heritage site (e.g., ancient artifacts) is discovered. All work must stop, and a heritage expert must be called.

scenarios.title: Manage Employee Training Records
scenarios.description: An HSE administrator needs to ensure that all employees have completed their annual safety refresher training.

scenarios.title: Schedule Haul Truck Preventive Maintenance
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner schedules a 500-hour preventive maintenance service for a haul truck.

scenarios.title: Diagnose Shovel Hydraulic Fault
scenarios.description: A shovel operator reports a 'low hydraulic pressure' alarm. A reliability engineer must diagnose the fault remotely.

scenarios.title: Plan Processing Plant Shutdown
scenarios.description: A shutdown planner develops a detailed plan for a major maintenance shutdown of the entire processing plant.

scenarios.title: Manage Critical Spare Parts
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner reviews the inventory of a critical spare part (e.g., a large motor for a mill) and ensures a spare is on hand.

scenarios.title: Analyze Conveyor Vibration Data
scenarios.description: A reliability engineer analyzes vibration data from a critical conveyor belt's gearbox to detect early signs of a bearing fault.

scenarios.title: Create Corrective Maintenance Work Order
scenarios.description: A field operator notices a leak on a pipeline and creates a work order in the system for maintenance to repair it.

scenarios.title: Plan Corrective Maintenance Job
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner receives a work order to replace a leaking pump and must plan the job.

scenarios.title: Inspect Dragline Structural Integrity
scenarios.description: A reliability engineer plans and reviews the results of a non-destructive testing (NDT) inspection on a dragline boom to check for cracks.

scenarios.title: Manage Haul Truck Tire Performance
scenarios.description: A tire specialist monitors the condition of haul truck tires to maximize their lifespan and avoid premature failures.

scenarios.title: Manage Equipment Lubrication Schedule
scenarios.description: A maintenance technician performs scheduled lubrication tasks on fixed plant equipment.

scenarios.title: Analyze Haul Truck Oil Sample
scenarios.description: A technician takes an oil sample from a haul truck's engine. The sample is sent to a lab to check for wear metals that could indicate an engine problem.

scenarios.title: Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA)
scenarios.description: After a major failure of a gearbox, a reliability engineer leads a team to perform a formal Root Cause Analysis to prevent recurrence.

scenarios.title: Manage Maintenance Backlog
scenarios.description: A maintenance superintendent reviews the backlog of open work orders to prioritize them and ensure the most critical work is done first.

scenarios.title: Manage Component Rebuild Program
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner manages the program for rebuilding major components (like haul truck engines) to be swapped into the fleet.

scenarios.title: Manage Mobile Equipment Fluid Levels
scenarios.description: A technician at a fuel bay is responsible for checking and topping up the fluids (fuel, oil, coolant) of every haul truck at the end of its shift.

scenarios.title: Plan and Execute Mill Reline
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner organizes a major shutdown to replace the worn steel liners inside a large SAG mill.

scenarios.title: Manage Equipment Defect Elimination
scenarios.description: A supervisor finds a defect on a piece of equipment (e.g., a cracked weld) during an inspection and reports it for repair.

scenarios.title: Perform Electrical Thermography Inspection
scenarios.description: An electrician uses a thermal imaging camera to inspect electrical switchgear for hot spots, which can indicate a poor connection and a fire risk.

scenarios.title: Manage Equipment Warranty Claim
scenarios.description: A major component on a new haul truck fails prematurely while still under warranty. A maintenance manager must file a claim with the manufacturer (OEM).

scenarios.title: Dispatch Haul Truck
scenarios.description: A mine dispatcher in the control room receives a request from a shovel and dispatches the nearest available haul truck to be loaded.

scenarios.title: Manage Underground Ventilation on Demand
scenarios.description: An underground mine operator uses a Ventilation on Demand (VOD) system to adjust fan speeds based on where people and equipment are working.

scenarios.title: Manage Stockpile Blending
scenarios.description: A stockpile manager directs haul trucks to dump ore from different parts of the pit onto specific locations on the ROM pad to build a blended stockpile.

scenarios.title: Execute Blast Pattern
scenarios.description: A blast crew foreman oversees the execution of a designed blast, including drilling the holes and charging them with explosives.

scenarios.title: Manage Underground Longwall Operation
scenarios.description: A control room operator for an underground coal mine monitors the progress of a longwall shearer.

scenarios.title: Manage Waste Rock Dump Construction
scenarios.description: A mine operator ensures that waste rock is being placed in the waste dump according to the engineered design.

scenarios.title: Monitor Haul Truck Payload
scenarios.description: A dispatcher monitors haul truck payloads in real-time to ensure they are being loaded correctly, avoiding underloading (inefficient) and overloading (unsafe).

scenarios.title: Check Blast Fragmentation
scenarios.description: After a blast, an engineer uses a photo-analysis system to check the rock fragmentation to ensure it is suitable for the shovel and crusher.

scenarios.title: Manage Autonomous Drilling Fleet
scenarios.description: A control room operator oversees a fleet of autonomous drill rigs, assigning them tasks and monitoring their performance.

scenarios.title: Manage Underground Backfill Operations
scenarios.description: After a stope has been mined out in an underground mine, it must be filled with backfill (e.g., cemented rock fill) to provide ground support.

scenarios.title: Manage Autonomous Haulage Fleet
scenarios.description: A control room operator oversees a fleet of autonomous haul trucks, monitoring for obstacles and managing system exceptions.

scenarios.title: Manage Underground Dewatering
scenarios.description: An underground operator inspects and manages the pumps and sumps that keep their work area dry.

scenarios.title: Manage In-Pit Crushing and Conveying
scenarios.description: An operator manages an in-pit crushing and conveying (IPCC) system, where ore is crushed inside the pit and transported out via conveyor, instead of by truck.

scenarios.title: Inspect Underground Refuge Station
scenarios.description: An underground supervisor performs a weekly inspection of a refuge station to ensure it is ready for use in an emergency.

scenarios.title: Manage Cable Bolt Installation
scenarios.description: An underground ground support crew installs long cable bolts into the roof of a tunnel to ensure long-term stability.

scenarios.title: Manage Shotcrete Application
scenarios.description: An underground crew applies shotcrete (sprayed concrete) to the walls and roof of a new tunnel for ground support.

scenarios.title: Manage from Remote Operations Center
scenarios.description: An operator in a remote operations center (ROC) in a city is controlling equipment at a mine site thousands of kilometers away.

scenarios.title: Manage Underground Personnel Tracking
scenarios.description: In an emergency, a control room operator must use the personnel tracking system to find the location of every person underground.

scenarios.title: Manage Conveyor Transfer Chute
scenarios.description: An operator notices that a transfer chute between two conveyor belts is blocked, causing ore to spill.

scenarios.title: Manage Shift Handover
scenarios.description: A control room dispatcher finishing their shift must provide a complete and accurate handover to the incoming dispatcher.

scenarios.title: Design Open Pit Blast Pattern
scenarios.description: A drill and blast engineer designs a blast pattern for an open-pit mine to achieve optimal fragmentation for the shovels.

scenarios.title: Develop Life-of-Mine Schedule
scenarios.description: A long-term planning engineer develops a high-level life-of-mine (LOM) schedule to determine the sequence of mining and the overall project lifespan.

scenarios.title: Create Weekly Mine Schedule
scenarios.description: A short-term planning engineer creates a detailed schedule for the upcoming week, specifying which blocks will be mined each day to meet the plant's feed grade target.

scenarios.title: Design Underground Ventilation Circuit
scenarios.description: A ventilation engineer designs a ventilation system for a new section of an underground mine to ensure sufficient air is supplied.

scenarios.title: Conduct Feasibility Study Economic Analysis
scenarios.description: A mining engineer performs an economic analysis for a new mine project, calculating its Net Present Value (NPV) to determine if it is financially viable.

scenarios.title: Design Mine Dewatering System
scenarios.description: A planning engineer designs a dewatering system for a new open pit mine, including sump locations, pumps, and pipelines.

scenarios.title: Design Mine Haul Road
scenarios.description: A mine planning engineer designs a new haul road to access a lower phase of the open pit.

scenarios.title: Optimize Mine Haulage Profile
scenarios.description: A planning engineer analyzes the mine's haulage routes and production schedule to optimize truck fleet requirements over the next year.

scenarios.title: Evaluate Cut-off Grade Strategy
scenarios.description: A planning engineer evaluates the optimal cut-off grade (the grade that separates ore from waste) to maximize the project's economic value.

scenarios.title: Design Underground Stope Shape
scenarios.description: An underground planning engineer designs the optimal shape for a stope (the underground excavation for ore removal) to maximize ore recovery while remaining stable.

scenarios.title: Design Tailings Delivery Pipeline
scenarios.description: An engineer designs the pipeline system to transport tailings from the processing plant to the tailings storage facility (TSF).

scenarios.title: Analyze Mine-to-Market Logistics
scenarios.description: A logistics planner for a bulk commodity mine (e.g., iron ore) analyzes the entire supply chain from mine to port to identify bottlenecks.

scenarios.title: Design Underground Decline Access
scenarios.description: A mining engineer designs the main decline (a spiral tunnel) that will serve as the primary access for trucks and equipment into a new underground mine.

scenarios.title: Design Open Pit Slope Angles
scenarios.description: A geotechnical engineer determines the steepest possible slope angles for an open pit mine that will still remain stable, to minimize the amount of waste rock that needs to be mined.

scenarios.title: Optimize Underground Development
scenarios.description: A planning engineer optimizes the layout of access tunnels (development) in an underground mine to minimize cost while providing access to all planned stopes.

scenarios.title: Analyze Equipment Selection
scenarios.description: A planning engineer evaluates whether to purchase larger haul trucks for a new pit phase, considering both productivity benefits and capital cost.

scenarios.title: Design Blast Exclusion Zone
scenarios.description: A drill and blast engineer determines the required exclusion zone for an upcoming blast to ensure the safety of all personnel and equipment.

scenarios.title: Analyze Blasting Vibration Data
scenarios.description: After a blast, an engineer analyzes the data from vibration monitors to ensure the blast complied with environmental limits.

scenarios.title: Optimize SAG Mill Throughput
scenarios.description: A control room operator for a processing plant adjusts the operation of a SAG mill to maximize throughput while avoiding overload.

scenarios.title: Manage Flotation Reagent Dosing
scenarios.description: A metallurgist adjusts the dosing rate of a collector reagent in a flotation circuit to improve copper recovery.

scenarios.title: Monitor Tailings Dam
scenarios.description: A geotechnical engineer monitors instrumentation on a tailings storage facility (TSF) to ensure its stability.

scenarios.title: Daily Metallurgical Accounting
scenarios.description: A plant metallurgist performs the daily metal accounting to reconcile the amount of metal that entered the plant versus the amount that was recovered in the final product.

scenarios.title: Troubleshoot Crusher Blockage
scenarios.description: A primary gyratory crusher suddenly stops, and a control room operator must diagnose the problem.

scenarios.title: Manage Heap Leach Pad Operations
scenarios.description: An operator at a gold mine manages the application of cyanide solution to a heap leach pad to dissolve the gold.

scenarios.title: Manage High-Pressure Autoclave
scenarios.description: An operator at a gold processing plant manages a high-pressure, high-temperature autoclave used for pressure oxidation (POX) of refractory ores.

scenarios.title: Manage Thickener Operation
scenarios.description: A plant operator manages a thickener to separate water from tailings slurry.

scenarios.title: Perform Metallurgical Bottle Roll Test
scenarios.description: A lab technician performs a bottle roll test on a new ore sample to determine its leach characteristics and potential gold recovery.

scenarios.title: Reconcile Mine to Mill
scenarios.description: A metallurgist reconciles the tons and grade of ore that the mine claimed to have sent to the plant with what the plant actually received and processed.

scenarios.title: Monitor Overland Conveyor
scenarios.description: A control room operator monitors a long overland conveyor that transports ore from the mine to the processing plant.

scenarios.title: Manage Autogenous (AG) Grinding Mill
scenarios.description: An operator manages an AG mill, which uses large rocks from the mine as the grinding media instead of steel balls.

scenarios.title: Analyze Grind Size Distribution
scenarios.description: A plant metallurgist analyzes the particle size distribution of the output from the grinding circuit to ensure it is optimal for flotation.

scenarios.title: Manage Reagent Inventory
scenarios.description: A plant operator manages the inventory of a key reagent like cyanide or flocculant.

scenarios.title: Manage Gold Elution Circuit
scenarios.description: An operator at a gold plant manages the elution circuit, which strips the gold from the loaded carbon into a solution.

scenarios.title: Refinery Crude Slate Optimization
scenarios.description: A refinery economist uses an LP model to decide the optimal blend of crude oils to purchase for next month to maximize gasoline production.

scenarios.title: Hedge Physical Jet Fuel Cargo
scenarios.description: A trader has just purchased a physical cargo of jet fuel for delivery in three months and needs to hedge the price risk.

scenarios.title: Dispatch Fuel Truck to Retail Station
scenarios.description: A dispatcher receives a low inventory alert from a gas station and must dispatch a fuel truck to prevent a stock-out.

scenarios.title: Manage H2S Gas Alert
scenarios.description: A safety officer in a refinery receives an alert from a fixed H2S gas detector in a process unit.

scenarios.title: Issue Permit for Hot Work
scenarios.description: An operations supervisor needs to issue a permit to work for a maintenance crew performing welding (hot work) inside a process unit.

scenarios.title: Analyze Refinery Emission Event
scenarios.description: An environmental engineer investigates an alert from a CEMS (Continuous Emissions Monitoring System) indicating an exceedance of SO2 limits from a flare stack.

scenarios.title: Create B2B Lubricant Sales Order
scenarios.description: A sales representative for a major oil company places a bulk order for industrial lubricants for a large manufacturing client.

scenarios.title: Plan Refinery Unit Turnaround
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner develops a high-level plan for a major turnaround (shutdown for maintenance) of the Fluid Catalytic Cracker (FCC) unit.

scenarios.title: Analyze Product Arbitrage Opportunity
scenarios.description: A trader analyzes price differences for diesel between the US Gulf Coast and Europe to see if an arbitrage opportunity exists.

scenarios.title: Resolve Customer Fuel Quality Claim
scenarios.description: A commercial fleet customer claims a recent diesel delivery was off-spec and caused engine problems. A quality specialist must investigate.

scenarios.title: Conduct Field Safety Audit
scenarios.description: An HSE officer conducts a planned safety audit of a work crew performing maintenance, using a digital checklist.

scenarios.title: Manage Gasoline Blending
scenarios.description: A refinery operator needs to blend several components to produce a batch of on-spec unleaded gasoline.

scenarios.title: Track Crude Oil Tanker Shipment
scenarios.description: A supply scheduler tracks the progress of a VLCC (Very Large Crude Carrier) bringing crude oil from Saudi Arabia to a refinery in Texas.

scenarios.title: Update Retail Gas Station Prices
scenarios.description: A pricing analyst for a retail fuel brand needs to update the gasoline and diesel prices for a set of stations based on competitor prices and market costs.

scenarios.title: Simulate a Refinery Process Unit
scenarios.description: A process engineer uses a simulation model to predict how a change in feed quality will impact the product output of a hydrocracker unit.

scenarios.title: Manage Shipping Demurrage Claim
scenarios.description: A vessel chartered to deliver crude oil was delayed from unloading at the terminal. The shipowner submits a demurrage claim for the extra time.

scenarios.title: Respond to Gas Station Drive-Off
scenarios.description: A gas station manager needs to report a 'drive-off' incident where a customer filled their tank and left without paying.

scenarios.title: Troubleshoot Refinery Process Alarm
scenarios.description: A control room operator receives a high-temperature alarm from a heat exchanger in the crude distillation unit and must quickly diagnose the cause.

scenarios.title: Execute a Financial Swap Trade
scenarios.description: A trader needs to hedge their exposure to floating gasoline prices. They decide to enter into a fixed-for-floating price swap.

scenarios.title: Check Jet Fuel Specification
scenarios.description: A salesperson receives an inquiry from an airline for jet fuel. They need to confirm their product meets the required international specification (e.g., ASTM D1655).

scenarios.title: Report a Near Miss Incident
scenarios.description: A field operator reports a 'near miss' incident where a dropped tool nearly hit another worker, to ensure it is investigated and learned from.

scenarios.title: Manage Biofuel Blending Mandate
scenarios.description: A compliance manager must ensure the company is meeting its government-mandated obligation to blend a certain percentage of ethanol into its gasoline pool.

scenarios.title: Manage Refinery Hydrogen Supply
scenarios.description: A refinery operator manages the hydrogen plant and distribution network to ensure a reliable supply for hydrotreating and hydrocracking units.

scenarios.title: Confirm Trade Settlement
scenarios.description: A back-office analyst ensures that a physical cargo trade is settled correctly, meaning the payment is made and the title is transferred.

scenarios.title: Manage Asphalt Sales Order
scenarios.description: A sales rep for a refinery's asphalt business takes an order from a paving company for a specific grade of asphalt.

scenarios.title: Manage Refinery Alarm Rationalization
scenarios.description: A control systems engineer analyzes the performance of the plant's alarm system to identify 'bad actors' (frequently occurring or nuisance alarms) and rationalize them.

scenarios.title: Calculate Daily Mark-to-Market P&L
scenarios.description: A risk analyst calculates the daily profit and loss (P&L) for a trader's portfolio of physical and financial oil contracts by marking them to the market.

scenarios.title: Troubleshoot Fuel Terminal Automation
scenarios.description: A truck driver at a fuel loading terminal reports that the automated system is not recognizing their access card. A support technician must troubleshoot remotely.

scenarios.title: Manage Refinery Steam System
scenarios.description: A utilities operator manages the refinery's steam system, ensuring there is enough high-pressure steam for process units while optimizing fuel gas consumption in the boilers.

scenarios.title: Calculate Value at Risk (VaR)
scenarios.description: A risk manager calculates the Value at Risk (VaR) for the company's trading portfolio to estimate the potential maximum loss over a single day.

scenarios.title: Manage C-Store Inventory
scenarios.description: A manager of a gas station with a convenience store (C-store) needs to reorder drinks and snacks.

scenarios.title: Monthly Environmental KPI Reporting
scenarios.description: An HSE manager compiles the monthly environmental performance report for a refinery, including metrics on emissions, spills, and waste disposal.

scenarios.title: Plan Refinery Feedstock Change
scenarios.description: A refinery plans to switch from processing a light, sweet crude to a heavy, sour crude. A team must assess the impacts of this change.

scenarios.title: Manage Trading Position Limits
scenarios.description: A risk controller checks a trader's proposed trade to ensure it will not cause them to exceed their authorized risk limits.

scenarios.title: Conduct Management Safety Walkthrough
scenarios.description: A plant manager conducts a safety walkthrough, speaking with operators and looking for potential hazards to reinforce the site's safety culture.

scenarios.title: Pipeline Leak Detection Alert
scenarios.description: A control room operator receives an alert from the leak detection system and must verify if it's a real leak or a false alarm.

scenarios.title: Daily Crude Oil Storage Inventory
scenarios.description: A terminal operator must reconcile the measured inventory in a crude oil storage tank with the book inventory from the scheduling system.

scenarios.title: Submit Pipeline Nomination
scenarios.description: A scheduler submits a nomination to transport a batch of gasoline on a third-party pipeline for the next cycle.

scenarios.title: Third-Party Excavation Encroachment
scenarios.description: A compliance manager receives an alert that unauthorized excavation is occurring near a high-pressure gas pipeline right-of-way.

scenarios.title: Manage Pipeline Pigging Operation
scenarios.description: An operator schedules and monitors the run of a 'smart pig' (an inline inspection tool) through a pipeline to check for corrosion.

scenarios.title: Monitor Gas Compressor Station
scenarios.description: A control room operator monitors the health and performance of a natural gas compressor station to ensure it maintains pipeline pressure.

scenarios.title: Schedule Storage Tank Cleaning
scenarios.description: A terminal manager schedules a crude oil storage tank to be taken out of service for inspection and cleaning, as required by regulation.

scenarios.title: Manage Truck Loading at Terminal
scenarios.description: A terminal operator manages the process of a tanker truck arriving, loading gasoline, and departing from the loading rack.

scenarios.title: Respond to Landowner Complaint
scenarios.description: A landowner calls to complain that a pipeline maintenance crew left a gate open on their property.

scenarios.title: Monitor Pipeline Cathodic Protection
scenarios.description: A corrosion engineer checks data from a pipeline's cathodic protection (CP) system to ensure it is effectively preventing corrosion.

scenarios.title: Track Product Batch in Pipeline
scenarios.description: A scheduler tracks a batch of premium gasoline as it moves through a multi-product pipeline to ensure it doesn't mix with other products.

scenarios.title: Manage LNG Carrier Berthing
scenarios.description: A port operator coordinates the safe berthing of a large LNG (Liquefied Natural Gas) carrier at the import terminal.

scenarios.title: Manage Product Interface (Transmix)
scenarios.description: When two different products (e.g., gasoline and diesel) are sent back-to-back in a pipeline, a mixture called 'transmix' is created at the interface. An operator must manage this.

scenarios.title: Plan Pipeline Smart Pig Run
scenarios.description: An integrity engineer plans an inline inspection (ILI) run using a 'smart pig' to assess the condition of a major natural gas pipeline.

scenarios.title: LNG Regasification Planning
scenarios.description: An operator at an LNG import terminal plans the regasification schedule to meet the daily demand from the downstream gas pipeline.

scenarios.title: Manage Pipeline Hydrostatic Test
scenarios.description: An integrity engineer manages a hydrostatic pressure test on a newly constructed pipeline to ensure it is safe to operate.

scenarios.title: Coordinate Simultaneous Operations (SIMOPS)
scenarios.description: A terminal manager must coordinate two potentially conflicting activities: a tanker truck loading at one bay while a maintenance crew does hot work nearby.

scenarios.title: Analyze Smart Pig Inspection Data
scenarios.description: After a smart pig run, an integrity engineer analyzes the data to find and classify corrosion defects.

scenarios.title: Manage Pipeline Crossing Agreement
scenarios.description: A land manager handles a request from a utility company that wants to build a new water pipeline that will cross an existing oil pipeline.

scenarios.title: Manage Pipeline Pump Station Outage
scenarios.description: A pump station on a major oil pipeline goes offline. A control room operator must adjust the remaining stations to minimize the impact on flow rate.

scenarios.title: Investigate Suspected Pipeline Theft
scenarios.description: A volume balance analysis shows a consistent loss of product in a specific pipeline segment, suggesting a possible illegal tap.

scenarios.title: Schedule LNG Cargo Loading
scenarios.description: An LNG plant scheduler creates a plan to load an LNG carrier that is due to arrive in three days.

scenarios.title: Manage Custody Transfer Measurement
scenarios.description: An operator at a pipeline delivery point manages a custody transfer, where ownership of the oil passes from the pipeline to the refinery. Accurate measurement is critical.

scenarios.title: Manage Pipeline Drag-Reducing Agent (DRA)
scenarios.description: To increase the throughput of a pipeline without adding new pumps, an operator injects a chemical called a Drag-Reducing Agent (DRA).

scenarios.title: Seismic Data Interpretation for Prospect ID
scenarios.description: A geoscientist analyzes a new 3D seismic survey to identify potential hydrocarbon traps and define a drilling prospect.

scenarios.title: Create Well Drilling Plan
scenarios.description: A drilling engineer designs a well plan for a new offshore exploration well, including casing design and trajectory.

scenarios.title: Optimize ESP Performance
scenarios.description: A production engineer analyzes real-time data from an Electrical Submersible Pump (ESP) to optimize its frequency for maximum oil production without causing damage.

scenarios.title: Schedule Preventive Maintenance for Wellhead
scenarios.description: A maintenance planner schedules a preventive maintenance job for a critical wellhead based on runtime hours and manufacturer recommendations.

scenarios.title: Analyze Stuck Pipe Incident
scenarios.description: While drilling, the drill string becomes stuck. A remote operations engineer must analyze real-time data to determine the cause and recommend a course of action.

scenarios.title: Waterflood Performance Review
scenarios.description: A reservoir engineer reviews the performance of a waterflood project to ensure it is improving oil recovery as expected.

scenarios.title: Plan Well Abandonment
scenarios.description: An engineer prepares a plug and abandonment (P&A) plan for an old, non-producing well to ensure it is sealed safely and permanently.

scenarios.title: Manage Offshore Rig Personnel
scenarios.description: An offshore installation manager needs to generate a POB (Personnel on Board) list for an emergency muster drill.

scenarios.title: Correlate Well Logs
scenarios.description: A geologist correlates gamma ray and resistivity logs from a new well with logs from nearby offset wells to understand the stratigraphy.

scenarios.title: Monitor Drilling Fluid Properties
scenarios.description: A mud engineer on a rig monitors drilling fluid (mud) properties to ensure they remain within the planned specifications for wellbore stability.

scenarios.title: Gas Lift Injection Optimization
scenarios.description: A production engineer adjusts the gas injection rate for a gas-lifted well to maximize oil production while minimizing gas consumption.

scenarios.title: Investigate Pump Failure
scenarios.description: A reliability engineer investigates the recent failure of a critical injection pump to understand the root cause and prevent recurrence.

scenarios.title: Assess Exploration Prospect Risk
scenarios.description: A management team assesses the geological and economic risks of a potential drilling prospect before approving funding.

scenarios.title: Respond to Drilling Kick
scenarios.description: A driller observes a sudden increase in flow from the well, indicating a 'kick' (an influx of formation fluid). They must initiate well control procedures immediately.

scenarios.title: Manage Production Chemical Injection
scenarios.description: A production technician manages the injection of corrosion inhibitor into a subsea pipeline.

scenarios.title: Request LWD Services
scenarios.description: A geologist decides to run a Logging-While-Drilling (LWD) tool to get real-time formation data in the next section of a well.

scenarios.title: Monitor Hydraulic Fracturing Job
scenarios.description: A completions engineer at a remote center monitors a hydraulic fracturing (fracking) job in real-time to ensure it is executed as designed.

scenarios.title: Allocate Field Production Volumes
scenarios.description: A production accountant allocates the total oil, gas, and water production measured at a central facility back to the individual wells that feed into it.

scenarios.title: Plan Offshore Crane Lift
scenarios.description: An offshore logistics coordinator plans a critical crane lift to move a large piece of equipment from a supply boat to the platform deck.

scenarios.title: Analyze Drill Bit Performance
scenarios.description: After drilling a well section, an engineer analyzes the performance of the drill bit to decide if it can be used again or should be replaced.

scenarios.title: Plan Helicopter Flight for Crew Change
scenarios.description: A logistics coordinator plans a helicopter flight to transport personnel to and from an offshore platform.

scenarios.title: Perform Petrophysical Analysis
scenarios.description: A petrophysicist analyzes well log data to calculate key reservoir properties like porosity, water saturation, and permeability.

scenarios.title: Generate Daily Drilling Report
scenarios.description: A rig clerk compiles the daily drilling report for management, summarizing the last 24 hours of operations.

scenarios.title: Manage Offshore Platform Bed Space
scenarios.description: A logistics planner manages the allocation of limited bed space (POB - Personnel on Board) on an offshore platform for an upcoming maintenance campaign.

scenarios.title: Forecast Reservoir Production
scenarios.description: A reservoir engineer uses a simulation model to forecast the future oil production of a field under different development scenarios.

scenarios.title: Basin Analysis for New Ventures
scenarios.description: A new ventures geologist evaluates a frontier basin to assess its overall hydrocarbon potential before the company considers acquiring exploration acreage.

scenarios.title: Manage Well Cementing Job
scenarios.description: A completions engineer supervises the cementing of a casing string to ensure it provides zonal isolation.

scenarios.title: Analyze Production Downtime Event
scenarios.description: After an unplanned shutdown of an offshore platform, a production engineer analyzes the event to correctly categorize the cause and the amount of deferred production.

scenarios.title: Manage Offshore Spare Parts Inventory
scenarios.description: A maintenance supervisor checks the inventory for a critical spare part (a pump seal) on an offshore platform and orders more if needed.

scenarios.title: Geosteer a Horizontal Well
scenarios.description: A geologist uses real-time LWD data to 'steer' a horizontal well, keeping it within a thin, high-quality reservoir layer.

scenarios.title: Perform Rig Acceptance Test
scenarios.description: Before starting a long-term contract, a drilling supervisor performs an acceptance test on a drilling rig to ensure all equipment meets specifications.

scenarios.title: Monitor Well Annulus Pressure
scenarios.description: An integrity engineer monitors the pressure in the annulus of an offshore well for any signs of a leak or pressure buildup.

scenarios.title: Plan Subsea Well Intervention
scenarios.description: A subsea engineer plans an intervention on a subsea well using a remotely operated vehicle (ROV) to replace a faulty sensor.

scenarios.title: Assess Unconventional Shale Play
scenarios.description: A geologist analyzes an unconventional shale play by creating maps of key properties like thickness and total organic carbon (TOC) to identify the most promising areas.

scenarios.title: Optimize Rig Move
scenarios.description: A logistics specialist plans the move of a drilling rig from one well pad to another, aiming to minimize time and cost.

scenarios.title: Manage Scale Squeeze Job
scenarios.description: A production engineer plans and executes a 'scale squeeze' job, injecting scale inhibitor into a formation to prevent mineral scale from blocking a production well.

scenarios.title: Estimate Offshore Platform Decommissioning Costs
scenarios.description: An engineer creates a cost estimate for the future decommissioning of an offshore platform, as required for financial reporting.

scenarios.title: Perform Nodal Analysis
scenarios.description: A production engineer performs nodal analysis on a well to identify bottlenecks in the production system (from reservoir to separator) and find opportunities to increase flow.

scenarios.title: Plan Open-Hole Wireline Logging Job
scenarios.description: After a well has been drilled to total depth, a geologist plans a wireline logging job to get high-resolution data about the formations.

scenarios.title: Manage Rig Equipment Certification
scenarios.description: A rig manager must ensure that all critical lifting and pressure control equipment has valid, up-to-date third-party certifications.

scenarios.title: Analyze Production Log
scenarios.description: A well is producing more water than expected. An engineer runs a production log (PLT) to determine which perforated interval is producing the unwanted water.

scenarios.title: Process Adverse Event Report from Patient
scenarios.description: An agent must process a telephoned-in adverse event (AE) report from a patient, ensuring all necessary information is captured for regulatory reporting.

scenarios.title: Identify Patients for Clinical Trial
scenarios.description: An agent must query a database of electronic health records (EHR) to identify potentially eligible patients for an upcoming Phase 3 clinical trial for a new diabetes drug.

scenarios.title: Review Electronic Batch Record for Deviations
scenarios.description: An agent must review a completed electronic batch record (eBR) for a batch of tablets, checking for any recorded deviations or out-of-specification results.

scenarios.title: Respond to Medical Information Request
scenarios.description: A medical information specialist must respond to an unsolicited email inquiry from a Healthcare Professional (HCP) about the off-label use of a drug.

scenarios.title: Analyze Preclinical Study Data
scenarios.description: A research scientist needs to analyze the results from an in vivo preclinical study to determine the efficacy of a new compound.

scenarios.title: Compile a Regulatory Submission Dossier
scenarios.description: A regulatory affairs specialist must compile documents for an Investigational New Drug (IND) application.

scenarios.title: Monitor Cold Chain Shipment
scenarios.description: A logistics coordinator must monitor a shipment of temperature-sensitive vaccines to ensure it remains within the required temperature range.

scenarios.title: Resolve Clinical Data Query
scenarios.description: A clinical data manager finds a discrepancy in the EDC system and must issue a query to the clinical site for clarification.

scenarios.title: Review Promotional Material for Compliance
scenarios.description: An agent must facilitate the review of a new sales aid for a drug product, ensuring it gets approval from the medical, legal, and regulatory departments.

scenarios.title: Track Lab Sample Lifecycle
scenarios.description: A lab technician needs to log a new batch of patient samples, track them through an assay, and record their storage location.

scenarios.title: Manage CAPA from Quality Audit
scenarios.description: Following a regulatory inspection, a quality manager must create and track a Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA) to address a finding.

scenarios.title: Execute a Product Recall

scenarios.title: Select Clinical Trial Investigation Sites
scenarios.description: A clinical operations manager needs to identify and evaluate potential investigator sites for a new global oncology study.

scenarios.title: Plan Key Opinion Leader Engagement

scenarios.title: Identify Potential Drug Target from Genomic Data
scenarios.description: A computational biologist needs to analyze genomic data from cancer patients to identify a potential new target for drug development.

scenarios.title: Monitor for Regulatory Intelligence Updates
scenarios.description: A regulatory intelligence specialist must monitor global health authority websites for new draft guidances that could impact the company's products.

scenarios.title: Investigate Out-of-Specification Lab Result
scenarios.description: A QC analyst gets an out-of-specification (OOS) result during product release testing and must initiate an investigation.

scenarios.title: Manage Clinical Trial Supplies
scenarios.description: A clinical supply manager needs to ship investigational product (IP) to a clinical site based on their patient enrollment rate.

scenarios.title: Enroll Patient in Support Program
scenarios.description: A case manager for a patient support program receives a request to enroll a new patient and verify their benefits for a specialty drug.

scenarios.title: Manage Lab Reagent Inventory
scenarios.description: A lab manager needs to check the inventory of a critical reagent, notice it is low, and order more.

scenarios.title: Prepare and Submit a Periodic Safety Update Report (PSUR)
scenarios.description: A pharmacovigilance specialist must prepare and submit a PSUR to a regulatory authority.

scenarios.title: Manage Clinical Trial Site Contract
scenarios.description: A clinical operations manager needs to create a clinical trial agreement (CTA) for a new site and track its approval status.

scenarios.title: Manage Raw Material Inventory and Release
scenarios.description: A supply chain coordinator must manage the inventory of an active pharmaceutical ingredient (API), including receiving, testing, and release for production.

scenarios.title: Respond to HCP about Potential Drug Interaction
scenarios.description: A medical information specialist receives a call from a pharmacist asking about a potential drug-drug interaction for a specific product.

scenarios.title: Analyze High-Throughput Screening Data
scenarios.description: A scientist needs to analyze data from a high-throughput screening (HTS) campaign to identify 'hit' compounds.

scenarios.title: Respond to Health Authority Information Request
scenarios.description: A regulatory specialist has received an information request from the FDA regarding a pending submission and must coordinate the response.

scenarios.title: Investigate Manufacturing Deviation
scenarios.description: A production supervisor discovers a deviation during a manufacturing process (e.g., an equipment failure) and must open an investigation.

scenarios.title: Prepare for Clinical Trial Database Lock
scenarios.description: A data manager is preparing for the final database lock of a completed clinical trial.

scenarios.title: Manage Grant for Investigator-Initiated Trial
scenarios.description: An MSL must process a grant request from an investigator who wants to conduct their own study using the company's drug.

scenarios.title: Document Experiment in Electronic Lab Notebook
scenarios.description: A bench scientist needs to document a completed experiment, including protocol, results, and analysis, in an ELN.

scenarios.title: Prepare for a Regulatory Inspection
scenarios.description: A quality manager is notified of an upcoming FDA inspection and must prepare the site.

scenarios.title: Release Finished Product Batch
scenarios.description: A QA specialist must perform the final review of all production and quality data before releasing a batch of finished product for distribution.

scenarios.title: Enroll Patient in a Clinical Trial
scenarios.description: A Clinical Research Coordinator (CRC) at a hospital site needs to enroll a patient who has consented to participate in a trial.

scenarios.title: Manage Adverse Event from Social Media
scenarios.description: An agent monitoring social media finds a public post describing a potential adverse event for a company product.

scenarios.title: Author a Clinical Study Report
scenarios.description: A medical writer must author a clinical study report (CSR) following the analysis of a completed trial.

scenarios.title: Schedule Lab Equipment Maintenance
scenarios.description: A lab manager needs to schedule preventative maintenance for a high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC) machine.

scenarios.title: Develop a Clinical Trial Protocol
scenarios.description: A clinical scientist is leading the development of a new protocol for a Phase 1 study.

scenarios.title: Manage a Product Quality Complaint
scenarios.description: A pharmacist calls to complain that a batch of tablets appears discolored. A quality specialist must handle the complaint.

scenarios.title: Manage Patient Co-pay Assistance
scenarios.description: A patient calls a support program to activate a co-pay card to help with the cost of their prescription.

scenarios.title: Collaborate on Research Data Analysis
scenarios.description: A team of scientists is collaborating on the analysis of a large dataset and needs to share results and interpretations.

scenarios.title: Conduct Literature Search for Adverse Event
scenarios.description: A pharmacovigilance scientist must conduct a literature search to identify any published case reports for a specific drug-event combination.

scenarios.title: Manage Trial Master File (TMF)
scenarios.description: A clinical trial assistant must upload and index documents into the electronic Trial Master File (eTMF) for a study.

scenarios.title: Conduct a Vendor Qualification Audit
scenarios.description: A QA auditor must conduct an audit of a new raw material supplier to ensure they meet quality standards.

scenarios.title: Create Slide Deck for Medical Conference
scenarios.description: An MSL needs to create a slide presentation summarizing recent clinical trial data for an upcoming medical conference.

scenarios.title: Design a Preclinical Animal Study
scenarios.description: A research scientist needs to design a protocol for a new preclinical toxicology study in rats.

scenarios.title: Manage Change Control for an SOP

scenarios.title: Plan Weekly Production Schedule

scenarios.title: Review Patient-Reported Outcomes

scenarios.title: Manage Cell Bank Inventory
scenarios.description: A scientist needs to retrieve a vial from the master cell bank for use in an experiment and document the process.

scenarios.title: Process Adverse Event Report from HCP Email

scenarios.title: Track Clinical Site Monitoring Visit

scenarios.title: Manage Drug Serialization Data
scenarios.description: A supply chain analyst must ensure that serialization data for a batch of product is correctly commissioned and sent to downstream partners.

scenarios.title: Create Patient-Facing Educational Material
scenarios.description: A medical communications specialist needs to create a patient-friendly brochure explaining a specific disease state.

scenarios.title: Search for a Protein Structure
scenarios.description: A structural biologist needs to find the 3D structure of a target protein to aid in drug design.

scenarios.title: Update Product Labeling
scenarios.description: Following the identification of a new safety signal, the company must update the product's official labeling (prescribing information).

scenarios.title: Manage a Product Stability Study
scenarios.description: A QC specialist must manage a stability study for a drug product, pulling samples at specified time points and submitting them for testing.

scenarios.title: Assess Clinical Trial Feasibility
scenarios.description: A clinical scientist needs to assess the feasibility of a proposed trial design by analyzing patient data.

scenarios.title: Log a KOL Interaction
scenarios.description: Following a meeting with a KOL, an MSL must log the details of the interaction in the CRM system.

scenarios.title: Analyze Proteomics Data
scenarios.description: A scientist needs to analyze mass spectrometry data to identify proteins that are differentially expressed between healthy and diseased tissue samples.

scenarios.title: Triage an Incoming Safety Case

scenarios.description: A clinical finance specialist needs to process a payment to a clinical trial site based on completed patient visits.

scenarios.title: Handle a Shipping Temperature Excursion

scenarios.title: Draft an Abstract for a Scientific Publication
scenarios.description: A medical writer needs to draft an abstract summarizing the results of a clinical study for submission to a journal.

scenarios.title: Perform In Silico Toxicity Prediction

scenarios.title: Archive a Regulatory Submission
scenarios.description: After a submission has been approved by a health authority, the regulatory operations specialist must formally archive the complete submission package.

scenarios.title: Assign Training for a New SOP

scenarios.title: Code Clinical Trial Data

scenarios.title: Handle a Product Reimbursement Inquiry
scenarios.description: A physician's office calls to inquire about the reimbursement status and coding for a new injectable drug.

scenarios.title: Manage Lab Instrument Calibration
scenarios.description: A lab technician must ensure a critical analytical balance is calibrated correctly before use.

scenarios.title: Process an Aggregate Safety Report (PBRER/DSUR)
scenarios.description: A safety physician is authoring a Development Safety Update Report (DSUR) for an investigational product.

scenarios.title: Perform Clinical Trial Close-Out

scenarios.title: Manage Artwork for Packaging Components
scenarios.description: A labeling specialist must coordinate the update of artwork for a product carton following a change to the prescribing information.

scenarios.title: Design and Document a DNA Cloning Strategy
scenarios.description: A molecular biologist needs to clone a gene of interest into an expression vector.

scenarios.title: Assess Impact of New Global Regulation
scenarios.description: A new regulation regarding medical device software has been published in the EU. A regulatory specialist must assess its impact.

scenarios.title: Investigate Yield Loss in Manufacturing
scenarios.description: A manufacturing engineer needs to investigate why the yield of a recent batch was significantly lower than average.

scenarios.title: Create an Electronic Informed Consent (eConsent) Form
scenarios.description: A clinical operations manager needs to convert a paper informed consent form into an interactive electronic version for a new trial.

scenarios.title: Track Competitive Intelligence

scenarios.title: Manage Animal Care and Use Protocol
scenarios.description: A lab manager needs to submit an annual renewal for an active animal study protocol.

scenarios.title: Manage a REMS Program

scenarios.title: Manage Institutional Review Board (IRB) Submission

scenarios.title: Review Environmental Monitoring Data
scenarios.description: A microbiologist must review environmental monitoring data from a sterile manufacturing area to ensure it remains in a state of control.

scenarios.title: Create a Publication Plan
scenarios.description: A medical publications manager needs to create a strategic publication plan for a product based on upcoming data readouts.

scenarios.title: Perform Virtual Screening of Compounds
scenarios.description: A computational chemist wants to perform a virtual screen of a large compound library against a protein target structure.

scenarios.title: Compile Annual Product Quality Review (APQR)
scenarios.description: A QA specialist must compile the APQR, a regulatory requirement that reviews all data for a product over the past year.

scenarios.title: Manage Return and Destruction of Clinical Supplies
scenarios.description: At the end of a clinical trial, a supply manager must arrange for unused investigational product to be returned from all sites and destroyed.

scenarios.title: Perform Medical Coding of an Adverse Event
scenarios.description: A drug safety physician must perform the medical assessment and coding for a complex adverse event case.

scenarios.title: Provide Product via Compassionate Use
scenarios.description: A physician requests access to an investigational drug for a seriously ill patient who is not eligible for a clinical trial (compassionate use).

scenarios.title: Analyze Gene Expression Data from Microarray
scenarios.description: A bioinformatician needs to analyze gene expression data from a microarray experiment to see how a drug affects a cancer cell line.

scenarios.title: Submit an Expedited Safety Report (e.g., 15-day report)
scenarios.description: A serious, unexpected adverse event has been processed and must be submitted to the FDA within 15 calendar days.

scenarios.title: Forecast Clinical Trial Supply Needs
scenarios.description: A supply chain manager needs to forecast the total amount of investigational product needed for the entire duration of a global clinical trial.

scenarios.title: Manage Equipment Calibration Schedule
scenarios.description: A metrology engineer needs to manage the annual calibration schedule for all critical equipment in a manufacturing facility.

scenarios.title: Process a Speaker Program Contract
scenarios.description: A medical affairs coordinator needs to process a contract and payment for a physician who is speaking at a company-sponsored event.

scenarios.title: Document Synthesis of a New Compound

scenarios.title: Track Health Authority Commitments

scenarios.title: Review an Informed Consent Form (ICF)

scenarios.title: Manage a Medical Education Grant
scenarios.description: A medical affairs coordinator receives a request for a medical education grant from a professional society and must process it.

scenarios.title: Search Literature for a Predictive Biomarker
scenarios.description: A translational scientist is searching for a potential predictive biomarker that could identify patients most likely to respond to a new drug.

scenarios.title: Handle a Cargo Damage Claim

scenarios.description: The port authority has approved a 3% annual increase in port charges. The finance department must update the official tariff document.

scenarios.title: Resolve an IT Helpdesk Ticket
scenarios.description: A user reports they cannot log in to the TOS. A helpdesk agent must resolve the issue.

scenarios.title: Process a Special Service Request
scenarios.description: A customer requests a service not covered by the standard tariff, such as providing a floating crane for a heavy lift. A manager must price and approve the service.

scenarios.title: Manage Contractor Access
scenarios.description: A third-party contractor needs temporary access to the port to perform work. The admin must issue a temporary pass.

scenarios.title: Track Container Demurrage Charges
scenarios.description: An import container has been sitting in the yard beyond its free time allowance. The system must track and bill the storage charges (demurrage).

scenarios.title: Generate Vessel Performance Report
scenarios.description: After a vessel departs, an analyst needs to create a performance report for the shipping line, detailing the productivity achieved during its port call.

scenarios.title: Archive Old Operations Records
scenarios.description: As per data retention policy, all operational records older than 7 years must be archived.

scenarios.title: Process a Truck Arriving at the Gate
scenarios.description: A truck arrives at the port gate to pick up an import container. The gate clerk must process its entry.

scenarios.title: Handle a Truck Arriving with No Appointment
scenarios.description: A truck arrives at the gate but does not have a Vehicle Booking System (VBS) appointment. The clerk must handle the exception.

scenarios.title: Handle a Container with a Customs Hold
scenarios.description: A truck arrives to pick up a container, but the system shows it has a hold placed on it by customs.

scenarios.title: Coordinate Train Loading
scenarios.description: A train has arrived at the intermodal yard to be loaded with containers for an inland destination.

scenarios.title: Handle a Damaged Container at the Gate
scenarios.description: A truck arrives to drop off an export container, but the gate inspection camera identifies significant damage.

scenarios.title: Process a Container for De-stuffing at CFS
scenarios.description: A container with goods for multiple owners (LCL) arrives at the Container Freight Station (CFS) to be unloaded.

scenarios.title: Handle Truck Arriving for the Wrong Container
scenarios.description: A truck arrives with an appointment to pick up container A, but they have physically brought container B to drop off.

scenarios.title: Manage an Empty Container Depot
scenarios.description: A trucking company wants to drop off an empty container at the port's empty depot. The operator must process it.

scenarios.title: Manage VBS Slot Release
scenarios.description: Due to increased productivity, the terminal can handle more trucks. The gate manager decides to release more appointment slots.

scenarios.title: Check Rail Car Status
scenarios.description: A customer calls to ask if a specific container has been loaded onto a train that departed yesterday.

scenarios.title: Manage Truck Queue during Peak Hours
scenarios.description: During a busy period, the truck queue outside the gate is getting long. The gate manager must take action to speed up processing.

scenarios.title: Update a Trucking Company's Information
scenarios.description: A trucking company calls to update their insurance information on file with the port.

scenarios.title: Process a Manual Gate Entry
scenarios.description: The gate's OCR camera system fails. The clerk must process a truck's entry manually.

scenarios.title: Process a Reefer Container at the Gate
scenarios.description: A truck arrives to drop off a reefer container with perishable goods. The gate process includes an extra step.

scenarios.title: Assign a Trouble Ticket at the Gate
scenarios.description: A gate kiosk's printer stops working. The clerk needs to report the issue.

scenarios.title: Process a Transhipment Container
scenarios.description: A container is discharged from one vessel and will be loaded onto another vessel at the same terminal without leaving the port.

scenarios.title: Manage Rail Car Inspection
scenarios.description: Before a train is loaded, each empty rail car must be inspected for damage or debris.

scenarios.title: Process Empty Container Pickup
scenarios.description: A truck arrives at the gate to pick up an empty container to take to a shipper for loading.

scenarios.title: Resolve Gate Camera Failure
scenarios.description: The OCR camera that reads container numbers at a gate lane fails. A technician must troubleshoot it.

scenarios.title: Manage Container Seal Check at Gate
scenarios.description: For a high-value cargo container, the shipper has requested a seal check upon entry to the port.

scenarios.title: Report a Minor Safety Incident
scenarios.description: A worker reports a near-miss incident where a container was nearly dropped. A safety officer must log the incident.

scenarios.title: Conduct a Port Security Drill
scenarios.description: The Port Facility Security Officer (PFSO) needs to conduct a scheduled drill simulating an unauthorized access attempt.

scenarios.title: Manage Hazardous Cargo Arrival
scenarios.description: A container with hazardous materials (HAZMAT) is scheduled to arrive. The HSSE officer must ensure it's handled correctly.

scenarios.title: Manage a Minor Hydraulic Oil Spill
scenarios.description: A terminal tractor has a hydraulic line break, causing a small oil spill on the quay. An environmental officer must manage the cleanup.

scenarios.title: Issue a Permit to Work for Hot Work
scenarios.description: A maintenance team needs to perform welding (hot work) on a crane. A safety officer must issue a permit to work.

scenarios.title: Verify Port Access Credentials
scenarios.description: A security guard at a gate needs to verify the identity of a person requesting entry.

scenarios.title: Manage an Emergency Response Drill (Fire)
scenarios.description: The port is conducting a full-scale fire drill at a warehouse. The emergency manager must coordinate the response.

scenarios.title: Monitor Port Air Quality
scenarios.description: An environmental officer needs to check the port's air quality monitoring system for compliance with regulations.

scenarios.title: Investigate a Security Alarm
scenarios.description: A fence perimeter intrusion alarm is triggered at night. The security control room operator must investigate.

scenarios.title: Handle an Unauthorized Person in a Restricted Area
scenarios.description: A CCTV operator spots a person without proper PPE walking in a restricted terminal area. They must respond.

scenarios.title: Manage Port Preparations for a Coming Storm
scenarios.description: A hurricane is forecast to approach the port. The emergency manager must coordinate preparations to secure the facility.

scenarios.title: Conduct a Pre-Shift Safety Briefing
scenarios.description: A shift supervisor must conduct a daily safety briefing (toolbox talk) with their stevedoring gang before work begins.

scenarios.title: Manage Environmental Compliance for Dredging
scenarios.description: The port is conducting maintenance dredging of a channel. An environmental officer must monitor for compliance.

scenarios.title: Manage an ISPS Security Level Change
scenarios.description: The national authority raises the security level for all ports. The PFSO must implement heightened security measures.

scenarios.title: Perform a PPE Audit
scenarios.description: A safety officer performs a random audit in the terminal to ensure all workers are wearing the correct Personal Protective Equipment (PPE).

scenarios.title: Manage a Vessel's Waste Log
scenarios.description: As part of an environmental inspection, an officer must check a vessel's garbage and oil record books for compliance.

scenarios.title: Respond to a Medical Emergency
scenarios.description: A worker has been injured on the quay. The port's emergency response system must be activated.

scenarios.title: Plan Container Yard Stacking
scenarios.description: A vessel is due to discharge 500 containers. The yard planner must pre-plan the optimal stacking locations for them.

scenarios.title: Handle a Reefer Container Temperature Alarm
scenarios.description: The terminal monitoring system sends an alert that a refrigerated (reefer) container's temperature is out of range.

scenarios.title: Create a Vessel Stowage Plan
scenarios.description: A vessel is scheduled to load 800 export containers. The stowage planner must create the plan for where each container goes on the ship.

scenarios.title: Dispatch Quay Crane to a Vessel
scenarios.description: A vessel has berthed and is ready to begin cargo operations. A dispatcher must assign cranes to start discharging containers.

scenarios.title: Handle Out-of-Gauge (OOG) Cargo
scenarios.description: A large piece of machinery that doesn't fit in a standard container (OOG) needs to be loaded onto a vessel.

scenarios.title: Reposition a Container in the Yard
scenarios.description: A container was stacked in the wrong block. A planner needs to create a job to move it to the correct location.

scenarios.title: Manage Horizontal Transport Fleet
scenarios.description: A dispatcher for terminal tractors (ITVs) must efficiently assign jobs to move containers from the ship to the yard.

scenarios.title: Update a Stowage Plan in Real-Time
scenarios.description: During vessel loading, a container that was planned to be loaded is found to be damaged. The planner must update the stowage plan.

scenarios.title: Perform Crane to Vessel Lashing Check
scenarios.description: Before a crane operator begins lifting containers, a checker on the vessel must confirm the container's twistlocks are unlocked.

scenarios.title: Handle a Quay Crane Breakdown
scenarios.description: During vessel operations, a quay crane suddenly stops working. The shift manager must manage the situation to minimize delays.

scenarios.title: Conduct a Yard Inventory Check
scenarios.description: The system shows a container should be in a specific location, but the truck driver cannot find it. An operator must verify its physical location.

scenarios.title: Coordinate an Inter-Terminal Transfer
scenarios.description: A container was discharged at Terminal A but needs to be loaded onto a vessel at Terminal B. A transfer must be arranged.

scenarios.title: Confirm Reefer Power Connection
scenarios.description: A reefer container has been stacked in the yard. A technician must confirm it has been plugged into a power source.

scenarios.title: Load the Last Container on a Vessel
scenarios.description: Cargo operations are nearly complete. The foreman must supervise the loading of the final container and hatch cover.

scenarios.title: Manage Yard Housekeeping
scenarios.description: To improve efficiency, a planner needs to consolidate containers from several half-empty yard blocks into one.

scenarios.title: Find a Container for Customs Inspection
scenarios.description: Customs authorities have ordered a physical inspection of a specific container. A planner must find it and arrange for it to be moved to the inspection area.

scenarios.title: Operate a Straddle Carrier
scenarios.description: A straddle carrier operator receives a job to move a container from under a quay crane to a yard stack.

scenarios.title: Manage Lashing Gear Inventory
scenarios.description: A stevedoring supervisor needs to ensure there is enough lashing equipment (e.g., twistlocks, lashing bars) for the next vessel.

scenarios.title: Optimize Crane Work Sequence
scenarios.description: A planner reviews the initial work sequence for a quay crane and sees it can be improved to reduce travel time for yard equipment.

scenarios.title: Weigh a Container for SOLAS Compliance

scenarios.title: Manage CFS Warehouse Inventory
scenarios.description: A customer wants to pick up their LCL (Less than Container Load) cargo from the CFS warehouse. The clerk must locate it.

scenarios.title: Handle Hatch Cover Operations
scenarios.description: Before loading containers into a vessel's hold, the large hatch covers must be removed.

scenarios.title: Manage Yard Crane Fueling
scenarios.description: A rubber-tired gantry (RTG) crane in the yard is running low on fuel. The fleet manager must arrange for refueling.

scenarios.title: Stuff a Container at the CFS
scenarios.description: Multiple small shipments of export cargo are at the CFS and need to be consolidated (stuffed) into a single container.

scenarios.title: Manage a Shift Change Handover
scenarios.description: At the end of a shift, the outgoing operations manager must provide a complete handover to the incoming manager.

scenarios.title: Schedule a Vessel Arrival

scenarios.title: Manage a Vessel Departure
scenarios.description: A vessel has completed cargo operations and is ready to depart. The operator must coordinate its sailing.

scenarios.title: Arrange Vessel Bunkering
scenarios.description: A shipping agent requests to arrange for fuel (bunkering) for their vessel while it is at berth.

scenarios.title: Monitor Vessel Traffic in the Channel
scenarios.description: A VTS operator is monitoring vessel traffic and must manage a situation where two vessels are on a potential collision course.

scenarios.title: Manage Mooring Gang Operations
scenarios.description: A vessel is arriving. The mooring gang supervisor must direct the linesmen to safely secure the vessel.

scenarios.title: Arrange a Vessel Crew Change
scenarios.description: A vessel agent needs to arrange for five crew members to sign off the ship and five to sign on.

scenarios.title: Handle a Vessel Schedule Change
scenarios.description: An agent reports their vessel is delayed by 12 hours due to bad weather. The scheduler must adjust the berth plan.

scenarios.title: Manage Vessel in Anchorage
scenarios.description: A vessel has arrived early and there is no berth available. The VTS operator must direct it to an anchorage spot.

scenarios.title: Handle a Vessel Agent Query about Port Charges
scenarios.description: A vessel agent calls to get an estimate of port charges for an upcoming vessel call.

scenarios.title: Supervise an Unmooring Operation
scenarios.description: A vessel is ready to depart. The mooring gang supervisor must oversee the release of the mooring lines.

scenarios.title: Handle a Pilot Ladder Safety Check
scenarios.description: A pilot is about to board an inbound vessel, but they report that the vessel's pilot ladder appears unsafe.

scenarios.title: Provide Vessel Waste Disposal Service
scenarios.description: A vessel at berth requests the disposal of garbage as per MARPOL regulations. The agent must arrange it.

scenarios.title: Handle a VTS System Failure
scenarios.description: The primary radar for the Vessel Traffic Service (VTS) fails. The operator must switch to backup procedures.

scenarios.title: Check Navigational Channel Depth
scenarios.description: A deep-draft vessel is scheduled to arrive. The pilot needs to confirm the current depth of the navigational channel, considering the tide.

scenarios.title: Handle a Vessel Diversion
scenarios.description: A vessel scheduled to arrive at the port is diverted to another port by its owners at the last minute.

scenarios.title: Confirm Vessel's Readiness to Sail

scenarios.description: A fire breaks out on a vessel at berth. The harbormaster orders an emergency unmooring to move the vessel away from the quay.
