scenarios.description: A day after a customer's online order is delivered, the system automatically sends them a request to review the products they purchased.

scenarios.title: Look Up Loyalty Points Balance
scenarios.description: A customer calls to ask how many loyalty points they have.

scenarios.title: Send a Birthday Offer
scenarios.description: It's the first day of the month, and the marketing system needs to send a special birthday offer to all loyalty members whose birthday is this month.

scenarios.title: Create A/B Test for an Email Campaign
scenarios.description: A marketing manager wants to test two different subject lines for an upcoming promotional email to see which one gets a higher open rate.

scenarios.title: Moderate a Product Review
scenarios.description: A new product review has been submitted and is waiting for moderation before it appears on the website.

scenarios.title: Add Points Manually to Loyalty Account
scenarios.description: A customer forgot to use their loyalty card during a previous purchase. A customer service agent needs to add the points manually.

scenarios.title: Create a Segmented Audience
scenarios.description: A marketer wants to create a special promotion for 'high-value' customers.

scenarios.title: Pause a Marketing Campaign
scenarios.description: A marketing manager discovers an error in a scheduled email campaign and needs to pause it before it sends.

scenarios.title: Analyze Customer Feedback
scenarios.description: A manager wants to understand common themes from recent customer satisfaction surveys.

scenarios.title: Upgrade Customer to VIP Loyalty Tier
scenarios.description: A customer's spending has reached the threshold to be upgraded to the VIP tier of the loyalty program.

scenarios.title: Send 'We Miss You' Email
scenarios.description: The marketing system needs to send a re-engagement email to customers who have not made a purchase in the last six months.

scenarios.title: Create a Social Media Campaign
scenarios.description: A social media manager is creating a campaign to promote a flash sale.

scenarios.title: Reject a Product Review
scenarios.description: A product review is submitted that contains profanity and is not a legitimate review of the product.

scenarios.title: Process a Standard Sale
scenarios.description: A store associate needs to process a standard cash purchase for a customer at the Point of Sale (POS) system.

scenarios.title: Open the Store for the Day
scenarios.description: A store manager needs to perform the morning opening procedures.

scenarios.title: Find a Product for a Customer
scenarios.description: A customer asks a store associate for help finding a specific product.

scenarios.title: Assign Daily Tasks
scenarios.description: A shift supervisor needs to assign restocking and cleaning tasks to associates for the current shift.

scenarios.title: Process Credit Card Sale with Loyalty
scenarios.description: An associate processes a sale for a customer paying with a credit card who is also a member of the loyalty program.

scenarios.title: Close Store and Reconcile Cash
scenarios.description: A manager needs to perform the end-of-day closing procedures, including cash reconciliation.

scenarios.title: Check Stock in Another Store
scenarios.description: A customer wants an item that is out of stock. An associate needs to check if it's available at a nearby store.

scenarios.title: Clock In for a Shift
scenarios.description: A store associate arrives for their shift and needs to clock in.

scenarios.title: Process a Tax-Exempt Sale
scenarios.description: A customer from a non-profit organization is making a purchase and has a tax-exempt certificate.

scenarios.title: Perform a Mid-Day Cash Pickup
scenarios.description: A POS terminal has accumulated too much cash, and a manager needs to perform a cash pickup to move excess funds to the safe.

scenarios.title: Assist Customer at Self-Checkout
scenarios.description: A customer at a self-checkout kiosk needs help because an item won't scan.

scenarios.title: View Upcoming Shift Schedule
scenarios.description: An associate wants to check their work schedule for the next week.

scenarios.title: Suspend and Resume a Transaction
scenarios.description: A customer at checkout realizes they forgot an item and needs to leave the line to get it. The associate needs to suspend the transaction to help the next customer.

scenarios.title: Report a Safety Hazard
scenarios.description: An associate discovers a liquid spill on the floor and needs to report it so it can be cleaned up.

scenarios.title: Provide Product Warranty Information
scenarios.description: A customer is asking about the warranty for an electronic item they are about to purchase.

scenarios.title: Request Time Off
scenarios.description: An associate needs to request a day off for a future date.

scenarios.title: Sell a Gift Card
scenarios.description: A customer wants to purchase a $50 gift card.

scenarios.title: Conduct Daily Team Huddle
scenarios.description: A manager starts the day by leading a team huddle to communicate daily sales goals and priorities.

scenarios.title: Handle a Spill Cleanup
scenarios.description: A customer has spilled a drink. An associate needs to clean it up and document the action.

scenarios.title: Swap Shifts with a Coworker
scenarios.description: An associate needs to swap their upcoming shift with a coworker.

scenarios.description: Agent must manage a high-fidelity Smart Factory simulation with streaming telemetry.

scenarios.title: Dispatch Emergency Services to Traffic Accident
scenarios.description: An automated incident detection system reports a multi-vehicle collision. An operator must dispatch the appropriate emergency units.

scenarios.title: Investigate Gunshot Detection Alert
scenarios.description: Acoustic sensors detect a gunshot in a public park. An operator must verify the threat and dispatch police.

scenarios.title: Coordinate Response to Flash Flood
scenarios.description: Heavy rainfall has caused flash flooding. An operator must manage the disaster response.

scenarios.title: Deploy Preventative Patrols Based on Crime Prediction
scenarios.description: The system predicts a high likelihood of vehicle break-ins in a specific area. An operator must deploy police patrols as a deterrent.

scenarios.title: Manage Crowd at a Public Protest
scenarios.description: A large, unplanned protest is forming. An operator must monitor crowd size and density to ensure public safety.

scenarios.title: Generate Evacuation Route During Wildfire
scenarios.description: A wildfire is approaching a residential area. An operator must generate and broadcast a safe evacuation route.

scenarios.title: Locate a Missing Person with a Smart Watch
scenarios.description: A family reports an elderly person with dementia as missing. The person is wearing a city-registered GPS smart watch.

scenarios.title: Identify Suspicious Loitering Near Critical Infrastructure
scenarios.description: Camera analytics detect a person loitering near a reservoir's perimeter fence for an extended period.

scenarios.title: Cross-Reference Stolen Vehicle Report
scenarios.description: A police department reports a stolen vehicle. An operator must check the city's license plate reader network for sightings.

scenarios.title: Deploy Mobile Camera Unit for Special Event
scenarios.description: For a weekend festival, an operator needs to deploy a temporary, mobile camera trailer to monitor the event grounds.

scenarios.title: Review Footage for a Criminal Investigation
scenarios.description: Police request video footage from a specific intersection for a time period following a reported robbery.

scenarios.title: Manage Police Response to Bank Alarm
scenarios.description: A silent alarm is triggered at a downtown bank. An operator must coordinate the police response.

scenarios.title: Manage Hazmat Spill Incident
scenarios.description: A truck has overturned, spilling a hazardous chemical. An operator must coordinate a multi-agency response.

scenarios.title: Identify Crime Pattern Using Predictive Analytics
scenarios.description: An analyst uses the system to find a pattern in a series of recent commercial burglaries.

scenarios.title: Monitor a Person of Interest with a Geofence
scenarios.description: Police have a person of interest under surveillance and want to be alerted if they enter a sensitive area.

scenarios.title: Provide First Responders with Building Entry Codes
scenarios.description: Firefighters responding to an alarm at a commercial building need the entry codes to get inside.

scenarios.title: Manage Road Closures for a Marathon
scenarios.description: An operator must implement and manage all road closures for the annual city marathon.

scenarios.title: Analyze Response Time for Emergency Services
scenarios.description: A fire chief wants a report on the department's average response time over the last year to see if they are meeting their goals.

scenarios.title: Manage Security for a VIP Visit
scenarios.description: A foreign dignitary is visiting. An operator must monitor their motorcade's route and ensure its security.

scenarios.title: Track Stolen City Asset
scenarios.description: A GPS tracker on a valuable city-owned asset (like a high-end mower from the parks department) indicates it has left its designated area.

scenarios.title: Respond to Citizen Report of a Broken Streetlight
scenarios.description: A citizen reports a broken streetlight via the city's mobile app. An operator must create a work order for the repair.

scenarios.title: Issue an Air Quality Alert
scenarios.description: Environmental sensors report a spike in airborne pollutants. An operator must issue a public health alert.

scenarios.title: Track a Building Permit Application
scenarios.description: A citizen calls to check the status of their building permit application. An operator must look it up and provide an update.

scenarios.title: Schedule Predictive Maintenance for a Bridge
scenarios.description: The asset management system, based on sensor data and age, predicts that a bridge's expansion joints will need service soon.

scenarios.title: Manage Graffiti Removal Request
scenarios.description: A citizen reports graffiti on a public building. An operator dispatches a cleaning crew.

scenarios.title: Process a Business License Renewal
scenarios.description: A small business owner has submitted an online application to renew their business license. An operator must process it.

scenarios.title: Notify Residents of Road Closure for a Parade
scenarios.description: The city has approved a parade. An operator must notify residents and businesses along the route of upcoming road closures.

scenarios.title: Update Public Asset Inventory
scenarios.description: A new public park has been completed. An operator must add the new assets (benches, playground equipment) to the city's asset management system.

scenarios.title: Find Location of a City-Owned Asset
scenarios.description: A public works employee needs to find the exact location of a specific piece of equipment (e.g., a mobile generator) for deployment.

scenarios.title: Handle Request for Bulk Waste Pickup
scenarios.description: A citizen requests a special pickup for large items (e.g., furniture, appliances) via the city's service portal.

scenarios.title: Process a Film Permit Application
scenarios.description: A film production company applies for a permit to film on a city street, requiring temporary road closures.

scenarios.title: Route Citizen Complaint to Correct Department
scenarios.description: A citizen submits a vague complaint about a 'mess' in a park. The agent must interpret the request and route it to the right department.

scenarios.title: Disseminate Information about a Missing Child (Amber Alert)
scenarios.description: Police issue an Amber Alert for a missing child. An operator must broadcast the alert across the city's communication channels.

scenarios.title: Check Status of a Pothole Repair
scenarios.description: A citizen who previously reported a pothole calls to check on the status of the repair.

scenarios.title: Retire an Old Public Asset
scenarios.description: A public fountain is being decommissioned. An operator must update the city's asset records.

scenarios.title: Close Permit After Final Inspection
scenarios.description: A building inspector has completed the final inspection for a new home and marked it as 'Passed'. An operator must close out the permit.

scenarios.title: Find Nearest Public Restroom
scenarios.description: A tourist uses a city information kiosk to find the nearest available public restroom.

scenarios.title: Update Asset Record After Repair
scenarios.description: A maintenance crew has just repaired a broken water pump. An operator must update the asset's records.

scenarios.title: Analyze Citizen Report Trends
scenarios.description: A city manager wants to know what the most common citizen complaints have been over the last year.

scenarios.title: Provide Information on Voting Locations
scenarios.description: On election day, a citizen calls the city's information line to find their assigned polling station.

scenarios.title: Adjust Building HVAC for Energy Demand Response Event
scenarios.description: The utility has called a demand response event. An operator must reduce energy consumption in a city-owned building.

scenarios.title: Remotely Dim Streetlights for Energy Savings
scenarios.description: During late-night hours, an operator needs to dim streetlights in a commercial district to save energy.

scenarios.title: Investigate Bridge Structural Health Alert
scenarios.description: Sensors on a major bridge have detected abnormal stress levels after a minor earthquake.

scenarios.title: Simulate Impact of New Development Using Digital Twin
scenarios.description: A developer has proposed a new high-rise building. A city planner uses the digital twin to assess its impact on traffic and solar access.

scenarios.title: Identify Faulty Streetlight
scenarios.description: The smart lighting system reports that a specific streetlight is consuming no power, indicating a fault.

scenarios.title: Authorize Access to a Secure Facility
scenarios.description: A contractor needs temporary access to a secure room in a city building. An operator must grant them access for a specific time window.

scenarios.title: Analyze Digital Twin for Emergency Vehicle Access
scenarios.description: A fire chief wants to know if a new ladder truck can access a narrow street and deploy its ladder to reach a specific building.

scenarios.title: Investigate Fire Alarm at City Library
scenarios.description: A fire alarm is triggered at the city library after hours. An operator must verify the alarm and dispatch the fire department.

scenarios.title: Analyze and Report on Building Energy Use
scenarios.description: A sustainability officer requests a report on the energy consumption of all city-owned buildings for the last year.

scenarios.title: Check Status of a Bridge De-icing System
scenarios.description: With freezing temperatures forecasted, an operator must ensure the heating elements on a critical bridge are operational.

scenarios.title: Detect Fault in Tunnel Ventilation System
scenarios.description: A sensor in a traffic tunnel's ventilation system reports a fan malfunction.

scenarios.title: Use Digital Twin to Plan Tree Planting
scenarios.description: A city planner wants to plant new trees and uses the digital twin to ensure they won't conflict with underground utilities.

scenarios.title: Adjust Lighting Based on Occupancy
scenarios.description: In a city office building, an operator links occupancy sensors to the lighting system to automatically turn off lights in empty rooms.

scenarios.title: Report Faulty Streetlight to Utility
scenarios.description: A city-owned smart streetlight is malfunctioning, but the issue is with the power supply, not the light itself. The operator must report this to the electric utility.

scenarios.title: Check Elevator Status after Power Surge
scenarios.description: After a power surge, an operator must check the status of all elevators in city-owned buildings to ensure none are stuck.

scenarios.title: Investigate Bridge Over-Height Vehicle Alert
scenarios.description: Sensors on a low-clearance bridge detect a vehicle that is too tall to pass safely. An operator must intervene.

scenarios.title: Manage Access for a Scheduled Event at a Rec Center

scenarios.title: Prepare Return with Social Security Income

scenarios.title: Claim Residential Clean Energy Credit

scenarios.title: Estimate Tax for a Bonus

scenarios.title: Advise on S-Corp Election
scenarios.description: The owner of a profitable LLC wants to know if electing to be taxed as an S-Corporation would save them money on self-employment taxes.

scenarios.title: Review Prior Year Return for Audit Risk

scenarios.title: Plan for Capital Gains Tax

scenarios.title: Advise on Record-Keeping for Schedule C
scenarios.description: A new freelancer asks for advice on what records they need to keep for their business expenses.

scenarios.title: Plan for Required Minimum Distribution (RMD) Taxes

scenarios.title: Advise on Hiring Employee vs. Contractor

scenarios.title: Project Tax Liability Using Annualized Income Method
scenarios.description: A freelancer with fluctuating income wants to calculate their estimated tax payments using the more complex annualized income method.

scenarios.title: Check Compliance with New Tax Law

scenarios.title: Advise on Tax Implications of Home Sale

scenarios.title: Security - SIM Swap Fraud Investigation

scenarios.title: Book a Standard Hotel Room

scenarios.title: Merge Duplicate Loyalty Profiles

scenarios.title: Book a Hotel Conference Room

scenarios.title: Handle a Lost and Found Inquiry

scenarios.title: Apply a Corporate Rate to a Booking

scenarios.title: Book an Accessible Hotel Room

scenarios.title: Arrange Airport Shuttle Service

scenarios.title: Handle Incorrect Room Rate Charge

scenarios.title: Handle Post-Stay Feedback

scenarios.title: Handle Arrival on Incorrect Check-in Date

scenarios.title: Troubleshoot In-Room Wi-Fi

scenarios.title: Process Payment for Third-Party Booking

scenarios.title: Recognize a VIP Guest

scenarios.title: Change Payment Method on File
scenarios.description: A guest with an upcoming reservation wants to change the credit card used to guarantee the booking.

scenarios.title: Book a Spa Appointment

scenarios.title: Process a Standard Guest Check-out
scenarios.description: A guest is at the front desk and wishes to check out of their room.

scenarios.title: Gift Loyalty Status

scenarios.title: Inquire About Lost Item at Attraction

scenarios.title: Add Frequent Flyer Number to Booking
scenarios.description: A passenger forgot to add their frequent flyer number when booking and wants to add it to earn miles.

scenarios.title: Book a Cruise Cabin
scenarios.description: A couple wants to book an oceanview cabin on a 7-night Caribbean cruise.

scenarios.description: A customer wants to rent a mid-size SUV for 3 days from an airport location.

scenarios.title: Handle Missed Cruise Departure

scenarios.title: Change Name on a Ticket

scenarios.title: Add Travel Insurance to Booking
scenarios.description: A customer who booked a vacation package wants to add travel insurance.

scenarios.title: Book Train Tickets
scenarios.description: A traveler wants to book two first-class train tickets from Paris to Amsterdam.

scenarios.title: Handle Damaged Luggage Claim

scenarios.title: Send Updated Itinerary After Change

scenarios.title: Book a Shore Excursion for a Cruise

scenarios.title: Modify a Rental Car Booking
scenarios.description: A customer needs to extend their car rental by two days.

scenarios.title: Handle Medical Emergency Onboard a Flight

scenarios.title: Apply a Travel Voucher to a New Booking
scenarios.description: A customer is booking a new flight and wants to pay for it using a travel voucher from a previous cancellation.

scenarios.title: Purchase Priority Boarding
scenarios.description: A passenger wants to add priority boarding to their existing flight reservation.

scenarios.title: Cancel a Rental Car Booking
scenarios.description: A customer needs to cancel their upcoming car rental reservation.

scenarios.title: Handle Itinerary Change on a Cruise
scenarios.description: Due to a storm, a cruise ship must skip a scheduled port of call. The cruise line needs to inform passengers and adjust accounts.

scenarios.title: Request an Infant Bassinet on a Flight
scenarios.description: A passenger traveling with an infant on a long-haul flight wants to request a bassinet.

scenarios.title: Upgrade a Cruise Cabin
scenarios.description: A passenger with an existing cruise booking wants to upgrade from an interior cabin to a balcony cabin.

scenarios.title: Update Real-Time Arrival Information
scenarios.description: A bus is delayed due to unexpected traffic. A control center agent must update the real-time passenger information systems.

scenarios.title: Plan a Bus Detour for a Parade

scenarios.title: Respond to a Vehicle Breakdown
scenarios.description: A bus driver reports a mechanical failure. A dispatcher must manage the situation by sending a replacement bus and maintenance crew.

scenarios.title: Manage a Fare Card Issue
scenarios.description: A passenger reports that their registered smart card is not working at the turnstile. A customer service agent must investigate.

scenarios.title: Analyze Ridership Data
scenarios.description: A transit analyst wants to analyze ridership data to identify the busiest routes and stops, to inform future service planning.

scenarios.title: Provide Trip Planning Assistance
scenarios.description: A tourist calls the customer service line for help planning a trip from their hotel to a museum using public transit.

scenarios.title: Manage Lost and Found
scenarios.description: A bus driver turns in a wallet found on their bus. An agent must log the item and attempt to contact the owner.

scenarios.title: Adjust Service for a Special Event
scenarios.description: A major concert is scheduled. A service planner must add extra late-night train service to accommodate the crowds.

scenarios.title: Manage Headway Adherence
scenarios.description: On a high-frequency bus route, two buses get too close together (bus bunching). A dispatcher must intervene to even out the spacing.

scenarios.title: Handle Security Incident on a Vehicle
scenarios.description: A train operator uses an emergency button to report a disruptive passenger. A controller must coordinate a response.

scenarios.title: Add Value to a Smart Card
scenarios.description: A passenger is at a station kiosk and wants to add $20 to their transit smart card.

scenarios.title: Report a Station Maintenance Issue
scenarios.description: A passenger reports that an escalator at a train station is broken. An agent must create a maintenance ticket.

scenarios.title: Perform Run Cut Analysis

scenarios.title: Analyze On-Time Performance
scenarios.description: A manager wants to review the on-time performance (OTP) for a specific bus route from the previous month.

scenarios.title: Handle a Fare Evasion Incident
scenarios.description: A fare inspector finds a passenger on a train without a valid ticket. The inspector must issue a citation.

scenarios.title: Handle a Passenger Complaint
scenarios.description: A passenger submits a complaint about a bus driver's unprofessional behavior. A customer service manager must investigate.

scenarios.title: Manage an Automated Passenger Counting (APC) System
scenarios.description: An analyst notices that data from an APC system on a bus seems incorrect. They must investigate.

scenarios.title: Manage a Paratransit Booking
scenarios.description: An eligible passenger with a disability calls to book a door-to-door paratransit ride for a medical appointment.

scenarios.title: Handle a Station Elevator Outage
scenarios.description: An elevator at a subway station is out of service, impacting accessibility. The control center must manage the response.

scenarios.title: Handle a Paratransit No-Show
scenarios.description: A paratransit vehicle arrives to pick up a passenger, but the passenger is not there. The driver must report the no-show.

scenarios.title: Handle a Broken Bike Rack on a Bus
scenarios.description: A passenger reports that the bike rack on the front of a bus is broken and they cannot use it.

scenarios.title: Generate a National Transit Database (NTD) Report
scenarios.description: A transit agency must submit its monthly operating data to the federal government's National Transit Database (NTD).

scenarios.title: Handle Onboard Announcement System Failure
scenarios.description: A bus driver reports that their automated next-stop announcement system has failed.

scenarios.title: Handle an ADA Compliance Complaint

scenarios.title: Manage Operator Run Bidding
scenarios.description: A new set of driver work assignments (runs) is available. Drivers must be allowed to bid on them in order of seniority.

scenarios.title: Build a Train Consist
scenarios.description: A yard planner needs to create a consist (a list of locomotives and railcars) for a new outbound train.

scenarios.title: Authorize Train Movement
scenarios.description: A train is ready to depart a siding and enter the main line. A network dispatcher must authorize the movement.

scenarios.title: Manage Yard Switching
scenarios.description: A yardmaster needs to create a switch list to instruct a crew on how to move railcars around the yard to build an outbound train.

scenarios.title: Manage Intermodal Container Transfer
scenarios.description: A container needs to be lifted from a train and mounted onto a truck chassis for final delivery.

scenarios.title: Manage Crew Rest Periods
scenarios.description: A crew dispatcher must ensure that a train crew does not violate federally mandated rest period rules.

scenarios.title: Respond to a Track Defect Report
scenarios.description: A track inspector reports a defect (e.g., a broken rail). The dispatcher must protect the area by stopping trains.

scenarios.title: Manage Car Hire Charges
scenarios.description: A railroad has used a railcar owned by another company. An agent must calculate and process the 'car hire' (per diem rental) payment.

scenarios.title: Manage Locomotive Fueling
scenarios.description: A locomotive is running low on fuel. A yard dispatcher must schedule it for fueling.

scenarios.title: Manage Intermodal Gate Congestion
scenarios.description: The system detects long wait times for trucks at an intermodal terminal's entry gate. A manager must take action.

scenarios.title: Report on Terminal Dwell Time
scenarios.description: A manager wants to analyze the average time railcars spend in a specific yard (dwell time) to identify inefficiencies.

scenarios.title: Assign a Crew to a Train
scenarios.description: A train is scheduled to depart. A crew dispatcher needs to assign a qualified and rested crew to operate it.

scenarios.title: Handle a Hot Box Detector Alert
scenarios.description: A wayside hot box detector sends an alert for an overheated wheel bearing on a specific railcar in a passing train.

scenarios.title: Manage Chassis Inventory
scenarios.description: An intermodal terminal manager needs to ensure there are enough available chassis (the trailer frames that hold containers) for upcoming train arrivals.

scenarios.title: Handle a Derailment Incident
scenarios.description: A train has derailed. A control center manager must coordinate the emergency response.

scenarios.title: Manage a Track Maintenance Window
scenarios.description: A maintenance crew needs a section of track to be taken out of service for 4 hours to perform repairs.

scenarios.title: Trace a Missing Railcar
scenarios.description: A customer is asking for the location of their railcar, but it is not showing up at its expected location. An agent must trace it.

scenarios.title: Handle a Grade Crossing Malfunction
scenarios.description: A citizen reports that the lights at a railroad grade crossing are flashing, but no train is coming. A dispatcher must investigate.

scenarios.title: Handle Special Cargo (Wide Load)
scenarios.description: A customer needs to ship an oversized piece of equipment that requires special handling and clearance checks.

scenarios.title: Handle a Blocked Crossing
scenarios.description: A train has stopped and is blocking a public road crossing for an extended period. The dispatcher must resolve the situation.

scenarios.title: Request Track Access for Utility Work
scenarios.description: A utility company needs to work near a railway track and must request permission to ensure the safety of their workers.

scenarios.title: Manage Private Railcar Storage
scenarios.description: A customer wants to store their private railcars in the railroad's yard. An agent must process the request and bill for storage.

scenarios.title: Handle a Major Track Outage
scenarios.description: A bridge washout has closed a main rail line for an extended period. A manager must re-route all affected trains.

scenarios.title: Handle a Customer's Railcar Release
scenarios.description: A customer has finished unloading a railcar at their facility and is releasing it back to the railroad, making it empty and available for its next load.

scenarios.title: Coordinate a Track Inspection
scenarios.description: A section of track is due for its mandated quarterly inspection. A manager must schedule the inspection.

scenarios.title: Manage an Interchange Agreement
scenarios.description: Two railroads need to formalize the process of exchanging traffic at a specific interchange point.

scenarios.title: Resolve a Lost Item Request
scenarios.description: A rider reports they left their phone in a driver's car. A support agent must facilitate its return.

scenarios.title: Onboard a New Driver
scenarios.description: A prospective driver has submitted an application. An agent must process it and activate the driver's account.

scenarios.title: Handle a Trip Payment Dispute
scenarios.description: A rider claims they were charged for a trip they didn't take. A support agent must investigate.

scenarios.title: Manage Surge Pricing During an Event
scenarios.description: After a concert ends, demand for rides skyrockets. The system must manage dynamic 'surge' pricing to attract more drivers to the area.

scenarios.title: Investigate a Rider's Safety Report
scenarios.description: A rider submits a report claiming their driver was driving erratically. A trust and safety agent must investigate.

scenarios.title: Handle Driver Account Deactivation Appeal
scenarios.description: A driver whose account was deactivated for low ratings is appealing the decision.

scenarios.title: Handle Cancellation Fee Dispute
scenarios.description: A rider was charged a cancellation fee but claims the driver never showed up. The support agent must investigate.

scenarios.title: Handle a Vehicle Accident Report
scenarios.description: A driver reports they have been in an accident during a trip. A safety agent must manage the initial response.

scenarios.title: Handle Driver App Technical Issue
scenarios.description: A driver calls support because their app is frozen and they cannot complete their current trip.

scenarios.title: Update Driver Documents
scenarios.description: A driver's vehicle insurance is expiring. They must upload their new insurance card to keep their account active.

scenarios.title: Handle a Rider No-Show
scenarios.description: A driver arrives at a pickup location and the rider never shows up. The driver needs to cancel the trip and receive a cancellation fee.

scenarios.title: Handle a Cleaning Fee Request
scenarios.description: A driver reports that a rider left a mess in their car and requests a cleaning fee.

scenarios.title: Handle Rider Complaint About Route
scenarios.description: A rider complains that their driver took a longer route than necessary, increasing the fare. An agent must investigate.

scenarios.title: Handle a Pre-Scheduled Ride
scenarios.description: A rider schedules a trip to the airport for the next day. The system must dispatch a driver at the appropriate time.

scenarios.title: Verify Driver Identity with Selfie Check
scenarios.description: To prevent account sharing, a driver is randomly prompted to take a selfie to verify it matches their profile picture before they can go online.

scenarios.title: Handle a Driver Referral Bonus
scenarios.description: A new driver signed up using a referral code from an existing driver. After the new driver completes the required number of trips, the referring driver must be paid their bonus.

scenarios.title: Handle a Multi-Stop Trip Change
scenarios.description: During a trip with multiple stops, a rider wants to add another stop.

scenarios.title: Handle a Driver's Rating Dispute
scenarios.description: A driver claims a low rating they received from a rider was unfair. They want it removed.

scenarios.title: Handle Driver Deactivation for Safety Violation
scenarios.description: A driver's background check re-run reveals a new, serious criminal conviction. Their account must be immediately deactivated.

scenarios.title: Handle a Platform-Wide Outage
scenarios.description: The ride-sharing app is experiencing a major outage, and neither riders nor drivers can use the service. The support team must manage communications.

scenarios.title: Process a Toll Reimbursement
scenarios.description: A driver paid for a toll during a trip. The cost of the toll must be reimbursed to the driver and charged to the rider.

scenarios.title: Handle an Airport Pickup Request
scenarios.description: A rider at an airport requests a ride. The system must guide them to the designated ride-share pickup area and manage the driver queue.

scenarios.title: Handle Account Takeover Suspicion
scenarios.description: The system detects a suspicious login to a rider's account from a new device in a different country, followed by a trip request.

scenarios.title: Handle a Community Guideline Violation
scenarios.description: A driver reports a rider for unprofessional behavior that violates the platform's community guidelines.

scenarios.title: Handle In-App Feedback
scenarios.description: A rider leaves feedback through the app suggesting a new feature. This feedback needs to be categorized and routed to the product team.

scenarios.title: Assign Driver to a New Load
scenarios.description: A dispatcher needs to assign a newly available load to the most suitable driver based on location, hours of service (HOS), and equipment type.

scenarios.title: Schedule Preventive Maintenance
scenarios.description: A truck is approaching a mileage threshold for its scheduled 'A-Service' preventive maintenance. A fleet manager must schedule the service.

scenarios.title: Log a Safety Incident
scenarios.description: A driver reports a minor, non-injury accident. A safety manager must log the incident and begin the investigation process.

scenarios.title: Process Driver Settlement
scenarios.description: An owner-operator has completed several loads. A settlement specialist needs to process their pay.

scenarios.title: Handle a Vehicle Breakdown
scenarios.description: A driver reports that their truck has broken down on the highway. A fleet manager must arrange for a tow and repair.

scenarios.title: Handle an Hours of Service (HOS) Violation Alert
scenarios.description: A driver is approaching their maximum allowed driving time. A dispatcher must instruct them to stop.

scenarios.title: Handle a Roadside Inspection Report
scenarios.description: A driver undergoes a DOT roadside inspection and receives a violation. The safety manager must log the report and schedule corrective action.

scenarios.title: Create a Freight Invoice
scenarios.description: A load has been delivered. An agent must create and send an invoice to the customer.

scenarios.title: Update a Driver Qualification File
scenarios.description: A driver's medical certificate is about to expire. A compliance manager must get the new certificate and update their file.

scenarios.title: Re-route a Truck Due to Road Closure
scenarios.description: A dispatcher receives an alert about an unexpected highway closure on a driver's route. They must re-route the driver.

scenarios.title: Manage IFTA Reporting
scenarios.description: A fuel tax specialist needs to prepare the quarterly International Fuel Tax Agreement (IFTA) report.

scenarios.title: Handle a Lumper Fee
scenarios.description: A driver has to pay a 'lumper' (third-party service) to unload their trailer at a receiving facility. The driver needs to be reimbursed.

scenarios.title: Find a Backhaul Load
scenarios.description: A driver is about to deliver a load, leaving them empty. A dispatcher needs to find a 'backhaul' load originating near the delivery location to avoid an empty return trip.

scenarios.title: Handle a Repair Order
scenarios.description: A mechanic needs to perform a repair on a truck, documenting parts used and labor hours.

scenarios.title: Update Customer with Revised ETA
scenarios.description: A driver is delayed by weather. The dispatcher must provide the customer with a new estimated time of arrival (ETA).

scenarios.title: Manage a DOT Audit
scenarios.description: A safety manager receives a notification of an upcoming DOT compliance audit and must prepare the required documentation.

scenarios.title: Handle an Accessorial Charge Dispute
scenarios.description: A customer is disputing a detention charge on an invoice, claiming the driver was not detained.

scenarios.title: Track a Driver's Location
scenarios.description: A customer is asking for a real-time update on the location of the truck carrying their shipment.

scenarios.title: Manage Maintenance Parts Inventory
scenarios.description: A mechanic uses a part (e.g., a filter) for a repair. The inventory system must be updated, and the part reordered if stock is low.

scenarios.title: Process a Fuel Purchase
scenarios.description: A driver uses a company fuel card to buy fuel. The transaction must be logged and associated with their truck.

scenarios.title: Optimize a Multi-Stop Route
scenarios.description: A driver has a load with three delivery stops. A dispatcher needs to sequence the stops to create the most efficient route.

scenarios.title: Handle a Parts Warranty Claim
scenarios.description: A part that was recently replaced on a truck has failed prematurely. The fleet manager needs to file a warranty claim with the part supplier.

scenarios.title: Assign a Trailer to a Tractor
scenarios.description: A driver needs to pick up a pre-loaded trailer from a yard. A dispatcher must assign the specific trailer to the driver's tractor.

scenarios.title: Manage a Trailer Pool at a Customer
scenarios.description: A high-volume customer has a 'trailer pool' where empty trailers are dropped for them to load at their convenience. A dispatcher must manage the pool's inventory.

scenarios.title: Handle an Overage, Shortage, and Damage (OS&D) Report
scenarios.description: A driver at a delivery location reports a discrepancy between the bill of lading and what is being unloaded (e.g., one pallet is over).

scenarios.title: Start New Electric Service
scenarios.description: A customer is moving into a new apartment and needs to start electric service in their name.

scenarios.title: Report Power Outage
scenarios.description: A customer calls to report that their power is out.

scenarios.title: High Water Bill Inquiry
scenarios.description: A customer is calling because their water bill is significantly higher than usual and they suspect a leak.

scenarios.title: Report Natural Gas Odor
scenarios.description: A customer calls reporting the smell of natural gas (rotten eggs) inside their home. This is a critical safety scenario.

scenarios.title: Stop Utility Service
scenarios.description: A customer is moving out and needs to stop all utility services (electric and water) at their address.

scenarios.title: Payment Arrangement Request
scenarios.description: A customer has received a disconnection notice and is calling to request a payment arrangement to avoid shut-off.

scenarios.title: Report Flickering Lights
scenarios.description: A customer reports that the lights in their entire house have been flickering for the past hour.

scenarios.title: Apply for Energy Efficiency Rebate
scenarios.description: A customer has purchased a new energy-efficient air conditioner and wants to apply for a $100 rebate.

scenarios.title: Report Downed Power Line
scenarios.description: A member of the public calls to report a downed power line on a street. This is a critical safety scenario.

scenarios.title: Update Account Contact Information
scenarios.description: A customer wants to update the phone number and email address on their account.

scenarios.title: Report Water Main Break
scenarios.description: A driver calls to report a large amount of water bubbling up from a street, suspecting a water main break.

scenarios.title: Request Tree Trimming Near Power Line
scenarios.description: A homeowner is concerned about a large tree branch growing very close to the power line that runs to their house.

scenarios.title: Enroll in Budget Billing
scenarios.description: A customer wants to enroll in the budget billing program to have predictable monthly payments.

scenarios.title: Report Low Water Pressure
scenarios.description: A customer calls to report that their water pressure has been very low all day.

scenarios.title: New Construction Service Request
scenarios.description: A building contractor needs to arrange for new electric and water service connections for a home under construction.

scenarios.title: Report a Streetlight Outage
scenarios.description: A resident calls to report that a streetlight on their street has been out for several days.

scenarios.title: Billing Dispute - Incorrect Meter Read
scenarios.description: A customer believes their bill is wrong because the meter read was estimated, not actual.

scenarios.title: Inquiry About Time-of-Use (TOU) Rates
scenarios.description: A customer wants to understand how Time-of-Use (TOU) electricity rates work and if they would be a good fit.

scenarios.title: Report Sewer Backup
scenarios.description: A homeowner reports that sewage is backing up into their basement.

scenarios.title: Transfer Utility Service
scenarios.description: A customer is moving from one address to another within the same service territory and wants to transfer their service.

scenarios.title: Medical Baseline Allowance Application
scenarios.description: A customer with a medical condition that requires powered equipment at home is applying for the Medical Baseline program to receive a larger electricity allowance at the lowest rate.

scenarios.title: Report Discolored Water
scenarios.description: A customer calls to report that their tap water is brown.

scenarios.title: Gas Meter Access Issue
scenarios.description: A meter reader was unable to access a customer's gas meter due to a locked gate. The system needs to notify the customer and schedule a new appointment.

scenarios.title: Sign up for Paperless Billing
scenarios.description: A customer wants to stop receiving paper bills and switch to paperless e-bills.

scenarios.title: Inquiry About Outage Cause
scenarios.description: After a power outage has been restored, a customer calls to ask what caused it.

scenarios.title: Set up Third-Party Notification
scenarios.description: An elderly customer wants to designate their daughter to receive a copy of any disconnection notices.

scenarios.title: Report Suspected Meter Tampering
scenarios.description: A field technician observes signs of tampering with an electric meter and needs to report it.

scenarios.title: High Gas Bill Inquiry
scenarios.description: A customer calls because their gas bill doubled in the winter and they want to understand why.

scenarios.title: Report Open Electrical Pedestal
scenarios.description: A resident reports that a green electrical box (pedestal) in their front yard is open, with wires exposed.

scenarios.title: Set up Landlord-Tenant Agreement
scenarios.description: A landlord wants to set up an agreement where the utility service for a rental property automatically reverts to their name when a tenant moves out.

scenarios.title: Inquiry About New Service Charge
scenarios.description: A customer is calling to ask about a new 'Grid Modernization Charge' that appeared on their bill.

scenarios.title: Apply Charity Pledge to Account
scenarios.description: A local charity has pledged to pay $200 towards a low-income customer's past-due utility bill.

scenarios.title: Report Open Fire Hydrant
scenarios.description: A citizen calls to report that a fire hydrant is open and gushing water.

scenarios.title: Outage Map Inquiry
scenarios.description: A customer is looking at the utility's public outage map and wants to know why their specific house isn't showing inside the outage polygon.

scenarios.title: Inquiry about Final Bill after Move-Out
scenarios.description: A customer who recently moved out is calling to ask about their final bill, which seems high.

scenarios.title: Report Damaged Electric Meter Box
scenarios.description: A customer reports that the electric meter box on the side of their house is damaged.

scenarios.title: Notify Customers of Critical Peak Pricing Event
scenarios.description: Due to extreme heat and high demand, the utility is calling a Critical Peak Pricing (CPP) event for the next day, where electricity prices will be much higher for a few hours.

scenarios.title: Donate to Bill Assistance Program
scenarios.description: A customer wants to make a one-time donation to the utility's charitable fund that helps low-income customers pay their bills.

scenarios.title: Report Water Theft
scenarios.description: A citizen reports that someone has illegally connected a hose to a fire hydrant to fill a swimming pool.

scenarios.title: Community Solar Billing Inquiry
scenarios.description: A customer enrolled in a community solar program is calling to understand the credits on their bill.

scenarios.title: Gas Pipeline Pressure Monitoring
scenarios.description: A gas control room operator needs to monitor pipeline pressure to ensure it stays within safe operating limits.

scenarios.title: Schedule Emergency Shutdown Valve Test
scenarios.description: A compliance manager needs to schedule the annual test of an emergency shutdown (ESD) valve at a city gate station.

scenarios.title: Cathodic Protection Monitoring
scenarios.description: An integrity engineer checks the status of the cathodic protection system, which prevents corrosion on a steel gas pipeline.

scenarios.title: Analyze Pipeline Inspection Gauge (PIG) Data
scenarios.description: An integrity engineer analyzes data from a recent PIG run to check for corrosion or defects inside a natural gas pipeline.

scenarios.title: Gas Emergency Response Plan Drill
scenarios.description: A compliance officer is simulating a pipeline rupture to drill the company's emergency response plan.

scenarios.title: Odorant Level Check
scenarios.description: A technician is dispatched to check that the correct amount of odorant (mercaptan) is being injected into the natural gas stream at a gate station.

scenarios.title: Plan Gas Meter Change-Out Program
scenarios.description: An asset manager needs to plan a program to replace all gas meters that are approaching their end-of-life.

scenarios.title: Gas Nomination and Scheduling
scenarios.description: A gas scheduler needs to nominate (request) the amount of natural gas needed from an interstate pipeline for the next day to serve its customers.

scenarios.title: Gas Pipeline Right-of-Way Patrol
scenarios.description: A technician is patrolling a gas pipeline right-of-way and observes unauthorized construction activity near the pipeline.

scenarios.title: Line Strike Emergency Response
scenarios.description: A third-party construction crew has struck a natural gas distribution line. The system must manage the immediate response.

scenarios.title: Launch 'Call Before You Dig' Campaign
scenarios.description: The public affairs department is launching a public awareness campaign to remind people to call 811 before any digging projects.

scenarios.title: Gas Compressor Station Monitoring
scenarios.description: An operator monitors the health and performance of a natural gas compressor station.

scenarios.title: Inline Inspection (PIG) Tool Tracking
scenarios.description: A control room operator is tracking the real-time progress of a PIG as it travels through a natural gas pipeline.

scenarios.title: Gas Quality Check
scenarios.description: A technician checks the quality of natural gas being received from a supplier to ensure it meets the utility's tariff specifications.

scenarios.title: Investigate Excavation Damage Incident
scenarios.description: After a third-party digging crew damaged a gas line, a compliance officer investigates the incident.

scenarios.title: Automated Feeder Fault Detection
scenarios.description: A recloser on a distribution feeder operates, indicating a fault. The system must automatically analyze the fault data and locate the issue.

scenarios.title: Automated Service Restoration Switching
scenarios.description: Following a fault, the FLISR system must automatically create a switching plan to isolate the fault and restore power to as many customers as possible.

scenarios.title: Conservation Voltage Reduction (CVR)
scenarios.description: A distribution management system (DMS) needs to optimize feeder voltage levels to reduce energy consumption while keeping voltage within acceptable limits.

scenarios.title: Transformer Overload Alert
scenarios.description: The SCADA system detects that a distribution transformer is operating above its nameplate rating due to high summer demand.

scenarios.title: Dispatch Crew for Outage Repair
scenarios.description: Following an outage, the system needs to dispatch the nearest available crew to the fault location.

scenarios.title: Analyze Pole Inspection Imagery
scenarios.description: An asset manager uses an AI model to analyze drone imagery of thousands of utility poles to identify defects.

scenarios.title: Grid Frequency Stability Monitoring
scenarios.description: A system operator is monitoring grid frequency in real-time to ensure the balance between generation and load.

scenarios.title: Short-Term System Load Forecast
scenarios.description: A system operator needs an accurate 24-hour load forecast for the entire grid to plan for generation dispatch.

scenarios.title: Automated Capacitor Bank Switching
scenarios.description: The DMS automatically switches capacitor banks on a feeder to manage reactive power and improve voltage.

scenarios.title: Asset Investment Planning
scenarios.description: An asset strategist needs to decide which aging substation transformers to replace next year based on health and criticality.

scenarios.title: Islanding Detection and Response
scenarios.description: A large solar farm's connection to the main grid is lost, but it continues to energize a section of the distribution network, creating a dangerous 'island'. The system must detect this and trip the solar farm offline.

scenarios.title: Power Quality Analysis
scenarios.description: A large industrial customer is complaining that sensitive equipment is failing, and they suspect power quality issues. An engineer needs to analyze data to diagnose the problem.

scenarios.title: Issue Generation Curtailment Order
scenarios.description: Due to low demand and high solar generation, a system operator needs to curtail a large solar farm to prevent over-generation.

scenarios.title: Vegetation Management Planning using LiDAR
scenarios.description: A planner uses LiDAR data to identify trees that are encroaching on transmission line right-of-ways and need to be trimmed.

scenarios.title: Dynamic Line Rating
scenarios.description: The system uses real-time weather data to calculate the actual, dynamic thermal rating of a transmission line, allowing more power to flow than its static rating would suggest.

scenarios.title: Storm Preparedness Planning
scenarios.description: A major hurricane is forecast to make landfall in the service territory in 3 days. The utility needs to prepare its response.

scenarios.title: Coordinate Planned Transmission Outage
scenarios.description: A transmission planner needs to schedule a planned outage of a major transmission line for maintenance.

scenarios.title: Economic Dispatch of Generators
scenarios.description: The energy management system (EMS) needs to create a dispatch schedule for the utility's power plants for the next hour that meets the load at the lowest possible cost.

scenarios.title: Substation Cybersecurity Check
scenarios.description: A cybersecurity analyst is reviewing logs from a substation's intelligent electronic devices (IEDs) for signs of unauthorized access.

scenarios.title: Post-Storm Damage Assessment
scenarios.description: After a major storm, the utility needs to assess the extent of the damage to the electric grid.

scenarios.title: State Estimator Analysis
scenarios.description: The EMS runs a state estimator to create a complete and accurate model of the current state of the power grid, even with incomplete or noisy sensor data.

scenarios.title: Contingency Analysis
scenarios.description: The EMS continuously simulates single-point-of-failure scenarios (contingencies) to ensure the grid would remain stable if a major piece of equipment failed.

scenarios.title: Microgrid Islanding Operation
scenarios.description: During a wider grid outage, a community microgrid must safely disconnect from the main grid and operate independently to keep power on for its local customers.

scenarios.title: DERMS Dispatch of a Virtual Power Plant (VPP)
scenarios.description: A Distributed Energy Resource Management System (DERMS) needs to dispatch a VPP of residential batteries to help reduce evening peak load on a constrained feeder.

scenarios.title: Plan Animal Guard Installation Program
scenarios.description: After analyzing outage data, an asset manager decides to proactively install animal guards on transformers in areas with high rates of animal-caused outages.

scenarios.title: Field Crew Safety Monitoring
scenarios.description: A dispatcher is monitoring the safety of a crew working near energized equipment.

scenarios.title: Develop Black Sky Restoration Plan
scenarios.description: A system planner is developing a restoration plan for a 'black sky' event (e.g., a major cyberattack or EMP) that causes a widespread, long-duration blackout.

scenarios.title: Synchrophasor Data Analysis for Oscillation Detection
scenarios.description: An engineer analyzes high-speed synchrophasor (PMU) data to detect potentially harmful oscillations on the power grid.

scenarios.title: Water Quality Monitoring Alert
scenarios.description: A sensor at the water treatment plant shows a sudden spike in turbidity levels in the raw water intake.

scenarios.title: Acoustic Leak Detection Analysis
scenarios.description: The system analyzes data from acoustic sensors in a District Metered Area (DMA) to pinpoint a non-surfacing water leak.

scenarios.title: Pump Station Optimization
scenarios.description: An operator needs to optimize the run times for pumps in the water distribution network to minimize energy costs while maintaining required water pressure.

scenarios.title: Generate Wastewater Compliance Report
scenarios.description: A plant manager needs to generate a monthly Discharge Monitoring Report (DMR) for the environmental regulator.

scenarios.title: Manage Water Storage Tank Levels
scenarios.description: An operator monitors and controls the water levels in storage tanks across the city to ensure adequate supply and pressure.

scenarios.title: Pressure Reducing Valve (PRV) Control
scenarios.description: The system needs to adjust a PRV to manage pressure in a water distribution zone with changing demand.

scenarios.title: Sewer Overflow Prevention
scenarios.description: During a heavy rainstorm, the system monitors sewer levels to proactively prevent a sanitary sewer overflow (SSO).

scenarios.title: Analyze Fire Flow Test Data
scenarios.description: An engineer is analyzing data from a fire flow test to ensure the water system can provide adequate flow for firefighting at a new commercial development.

scenarios.title: Annual Water Loss Audit
scenarios.description: A water resource manager is conducting an annual water audit to calculate the amount of non-revenue water (NRW) in the system.

scenarios.title: Chlorine Residual Monitoring
scenarios.description: An operator monitors the chlorine residual levels in the water distribution system to ensure disinfection is maintained.

scenarios.title: Dam Safety Inspection
scenarios.description: An engineer is performing a routine safety inspection of a dam.

scenarios.title: New Water Main Disinfection
scenarios.description: Before a newly installed water main can be put into service, it must be flushed and disinfected.

scenarios.title: Schedule Customer Water Meter Replacement
scenarios.description: A water meter has reached the end of its service life and needs to be replaced.

scenarios.title: Real-Time Hydraulic Modeling
scenarios.description: A water utility uses a real-time hydraulic model (a 'digital twin') to simulate the effect of operational changes before they are made.

scenarios.title: Wastewater Lift Station Monitoring
scenarios.description: A SCADA system is monitoring a wastewater lift station for potential failures.

scenarios.title: Plan Unidirectional Flushing Program
scenarios.description: A water quality engineer is planning a unidirectional flushing program to clean water mains and improve water quality in a specific neighborhood.

scenarios.title: Sewer Smoke Testing
scenarios.description: A wastewater crew is conducting smoke testing to find sources of rainwater inflow and infiltration into the sewer system.

scenarios.title: Book a Corporate Conference
scenarios.description: A corporate event planner wants to book a two-day conference at the venue.

scenarios.title: Sell Concert Tickets Online
scenarios.description: A customer wants to purchase four tickets for an upcoming concert through the venue's website.

scenarios.title: Resolve Guest Seating Issue
scenarios.description: A guest at a basketball game reports that someone else is sitting in their assigned seats.

scenarios.title: Dispatch Security for an Incident
scenarios.description: An usher uses their radio to report a verbal altercation between two guests in a specific section.

scenarios.title: Restock a Concession Stand
scenarios.description: A concession stand manager reports they are running low on hot dog buns during a sold-out event.

scenarios.title: Sell a Luxury Suite for a Season
scenarios.description: A corporate client wants to lease a luxury suite for the entire upcoming football season.

scenarios.title: Coordinate Event Logistics with Client
scenarios.description: An event manager is holding a final planning meeting with a client for their upcoming wedding reception.

scenarios.title: Handle Ticket Scanning Failure at Gate
scenarios.description: A guest's mobile ticket will not scan at the entry gate, showing an 'Invalid Code' error.

scenarios.title: Handle Guest Request for Accessible Seating
scenarios.description: A guest who purchased standard tickets has since broken their leg and now requires wheelchair accessible seating.

scenarios.title: Schedule Staff for an Event
scenarios.description: An operations manager needs to schedule ushers, ticket takers, and security for an upcoming concert.

scenarios.title: Handle POS System Failure
scenarios.description: The Point-of-Sale (POS) terminal at a busy concession stand has frozen during an event.

scenarios.title: Manage a Group Ticket Sale
scenarios.description: A school group wants to purchase 50 tickets for a matinee theater performance.

scenarios.title: Process Final Event Settlement
scenarios.description: An event manager needs to process the final invoice and settlement for a completed trade show.

scenarios.title: Handle Will Call Ticket Pickup
scenarios.description: A guest arrives at the box office to pick up tickets that were left for them at will call.

scenarios.title: Handle a Lost Child Report
scenarios.description: A frantic parent reports to a guest services booth that they cannot find their young child.

scenarios.title: Handle a Facility Spill
scenarios.description: A guest reports a large soda spill in a main concourse, creating a slip hazard.

scenarios.title: Process a Mobile Food Order
scenarios.description: A guest places an order for two pizzas and two sodas through the venue's mobile app for pickup at a specific concession stand.

scenarios.title: Manage VIP Artist Hospitality Rider
scenarios.description: The manager for a performing artist sends their hospitality rider, which must be fulfilled by the venue.

scenarios.title: Coordinate with a Third-Party Security Vendor
scenarios.description: A large music festival requires additional security beyond the in-house team, so a third-party security firm has been hired.

scenarios.title: Process a Ticket Refund for a Canceled Event
scenarios.description: An event has been canceled, and a ticket holder is requesting a full refund.

scenarios.title: Log a Lost Item
scenarios.description: A guest calls the day after a concert to report that they lost their wallet at the venue.

scenarios.title: Execute Venue Changeover
scenarios.description: The operations team needs to convert the arena from a hockey rink setup to a basketball court setup overnight.

scenarios.title: Order Concessions Inventory
scenarios.description: A food and beverage manager needs to place the weekly order for non-perishable items like popcorn kernels, cups, and napkins.

scenarios.title: Handle Suite Holder Special Request
scenarios.description: A season suite holder calls to request a special birthday cake be delivered to their suite during the next game.

scenarios.title: Reschedule a Booked Event
scenarios.description: A client needs to reschedule their booked wedding from a Saturday in June to a Saturday in September.

scenarios.title: Handle Fraudulent Ticket Claim
scenarios.description: A guest presents a ticket that has already been scanned, claiming their ticket must be the valid one.

scenarios.title: Provide General Event Information
scenarios.description: A guest calls to ask what time the doors open for a concert tonight and what the venue's bag policy is.

scenarios.title: Handle a Medical Emergency
scenarios.description: A staff member reports that a guest has collapsed and requires medical attention.

scenarios.title: Manage Concession Staff Break
scenarios.description: A concession stand worker needs to take their scheduled 30-minute break during a busy event.

scenarios.title: Handle a VIP Arrival
scenarios.description: The CEO of a major sponsor is arriving for a game and needs to be escorted to their suite.

scenarios.title: Generate Post-Event Report
scenarios.description: Following a large concert, the venue's general manager needs a report summarizing key performance metrics.

scenarios.title: Upgrade Season Ticket Holder Seats
scenarios.description: A long-time season ticket holder wants to upgrade their seats to a better location for the next season.

scenarios.title: Log a Found Item
scenarios.description: A cleaner finds a cell phone in the seating area after an event and turns it in to guest services.

scenarios.title: Log a Facility Maintenance Request
scenarios.description: An usher notices a broken armrest on a seat and reports it.

scenarios.title: Handle Food Allergy Inquiry
scenarios.description: A guest with a severe peanut allergy asks a concession stand worker which items are safe for them to eat.

scenarios.title: Prospect for New Suite Owners
scenarios.description: A sales manager wants to identify potential corporate clients to target for unsold luxury suites.

scenarios.title: Set up A/V for a Meeting
scenarios.description: An event coordinator needs to ensure the audio/visual equipment is set up correctly for a small corporate meeting.

scenarios.title: Manage Entry Gate Congestion
scenarios.description: Just before an event starts, security cameras show a large crowd and long lines forming at the main entrance.

scenarios.title: Handle Guest Complaint About Obstructed View
scenarios.description: A guest complains that their view of the stage is partially obstructed by a large speaker, which was not disclosed when they bought the ticket.

scenarios.title: Reassign Staff Due to No-Show
scenarios.description: A scheduled ticket taker has not shown up for their shift, and the gates are about to open.

scenarios.title: Close a Concession Stand Early
scenarios.description: Towards the end of an event, a food and beverage manager decides to close a low-traffic concession stand early.

scenarios.title: Process Group Sales Payment
scenarios.description: A corporate group that had tickets on hold is now ready to pay for their block of 100 tickets.

scenarios.title: Cancel Event Due to Severe Weather

scenarios.title: Exchange Tickets for a Different Day

scenarios.title: Find Owner of a Found Item
scenarios.description: A wallet is found with an ID inside. A guest services agent needs to attempt to contact the owner.

scenarios.title: Monitor CCTV for Suspicious Activity
scenarios.description: A security operator watching the CCTV monitors notices an individual leaving a backpack unattended in a high-traffic area.

scenarios.title: Handle a Broken Soda Machine
scenarios.description: A concession stand reports that their soda fountain is not working.

scenarios.title: Renew a Season Suite Lease
scenarios.description: A sales representative is contacting an existing suite holder to renew their lease for the upcoming season.

scenarios.title: Check Vendor Certificate of Insurance

scenarios.title: Handle a Partial Power Outage

scenarios.title: Sell Advance Parking Pass

scenarios.title: Handle Post-Event Guest Feedback
scenarios.description: A guest sends an email after an event complaining about long lines for the restrooms.

scenarios.title: Set up Stage for a Concert
scenarios.description: The operations crew needs to set up the stage, lighting, and sound system for a touring concert.

scenarios.title: Handle a Credit Card Chargeback
scenarios.description: The venue receives a credit card chargeback from a guest who claims they did not make a $50 purchase at a concession stand.

scenarios.title: Handle Lost Season Tickets
scenarios.description: A season ticket holder reports that they have lost their physical season ticket booklet.

scenarios.title: Handle a Last-Minute Booking Inquiry
scenarios.description: A company wants to book a small meeting room for 10 people for tomorrow.

scenarios.title: Sell ADA Tickets

scenarios.title: Handle a Guest Ejection

scenarios.title: Evacuate Venue for Fire Alarm

scenarios.title: Handle an Artist Cancellation

scenarios.title: Change Ticket Delivery Method
scenarios.description: A customer who chose to have their tickets mailed now wants to switch to digital mobile tickets.

scenarios.title: Provide Wheelchair Assistance

scenarios.title: Check Staff Credentials at Entry
scenarios.description: A person is trying to enter through a staff entrance but their credential will not scan.

scenarios.title: Handle a Keg Change
scenarios.description: A bartender reports that the keg for a specific beer has run out.

scenarios.title: Handle Press Credentials Request
